Name: Oasis Enterprises (Al Shirawi Group)
Description:
Oasis Enterprises creates immersive and original experiences for the most demanding applications using Audio Visual, Pro Lighting, Architainment, Automation, CCTV & ELV systems Integration. 

We have completed up to 5000+ projects since 1982 within numerous fields, such as: education, corporate, worship, healthcare, government organizations, and agencies of all sizes throughout MENA.

Services:

•	Audio/Video, Lighting design & consultancy
•	Projects management & planning
•	Fast supply & reliable installation and training
•	24/7 technical support and after sales service
•	Maintenance & operation contracts

Oasis Enterprises can help you with any requirements, from a single room to a full building management scheme, and is a distributor of well-renowned brands (ETC, ROSCO, Datavideo, Desisti, Ayrton, BB&S...).

“Our mission is to engineer reliable and cost-effective technological solutions that attain our clients' business growth potential.”

Awards:

• Sound and Stage Awards 2008 “Best New Projection/Display Technology of the Year” for Element Labs Helix LED Video Screens. 
• ETC 2008 “Distributor of the Year” for Dimming Systems and Turnover. 
• Digital Studio Awards 2009 “Best Academic Installation” for Sharjah University College of Fine Arts. 
• Sound and Stage Awards 2009 “Lighting Installation Project of the Year” for Dubai Aquarium, Dubai Mall.

Name: Aputure
Description:
Aputure was founded by a team of inspired filmmakers and videographers who wanted to create high quality content, but struggled with steep cost of equipment needed to do so. Determined to create professional-grade equipment at an affordable price, they started Aputure: the first company to provide truly affordable and professional cinema equipment with the quality and functions needed to fully realize any creative vision.

Today, Aputure sells globally in over 300+ cities with offices in Amsterdam, China, Singapore, India and the United States. It is one of the fastest growing cinema technology companies, designing and specializing in creative lighting solutions. 

As a part of the creative community, Aputure continues to develop for the ever-expanding needs of budding artists and professionals alike. Each member of our team has felt the burning desire to bring a creative vision to life at all costs. We're here to keep that fire alive.

Name: All Wave AV Systems
Description:
At Allwave AV Systems, we are dedicated to providing cutting-edge audio-visual solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of corporate workspaces. 

From custom AV integrations to comprehensive system designs, our expert team delivers innovative and reliable services. 

Operating in Mumbai, India, we are well-positioned to serve a diverse range of clients throughout PAN India through our branches in Pune, Delhi, Hyderabad, Bangalore, Indore, and Kolkata.

Our mission is to enhance communication and collaboration through state-of-the-art AV technology. Connect with us to explore how we can transform your business environment.

Name: Peerless-AV
Description: For over 80 years, passion and innovation continue to drive Peerless-AV forward. We proudly design and manufacture the highest quality products, including outdoor displays and TVs, dvLED and LCD video wall systems, complete integrated kiosks, professional carts and stands, and more. Whether a full-scale global deployment or high volume custom project, Peerless-AV develops meaningful relationships and delivers world-class service. In partnership with Peerless-AV, you are trusting an award-winning team of experts who will support your business every step of the way. For more information, visit peerless-av.com.

Name: Calrec Audio
Description:
Calrec Audio is a leading designer and supplier of audio broadcast mixing consoles and equipment, relied upon by the world’s most successful broadcasters.

Formed as a microphone manufacturer in 1964, Calrec’s reputation for build quality, reliability and audio performance has made it an industry benchmark across the world. 

We’re based in Hebden Bridge, but you hear us on live television every single day. From Premiership football and the Superbowl to ‘X Factor’ and ‘Dancing with the Stars’, if it’s live, there is a good chance it is mixed on a Calrec!

Name: McIntosh Laboratory, Inc.
Description: Founded in 1949, McIntosh Laboratory, Inc. is known for offering distinguished quality audio products, superior customer service and the ultimate experience in music and film. All McIntosh products are handcrafted at the Binghamton, NY factory by over 150 employees with a passion for music and the McIntosh heritage. McIntosh continues to define the ultimate home entertainment experience for discriminating consumers around the world, with the iconic “McIntosh Blue” Watt Meters globally recognized as a symbol of quality audio. Since its inception, McIntosh has been powering some of the most important moments in music history and pop culture. From President Lyndon Johnson’s inauguration speech to Woodstock to the famous Grateful Dead “Wall of Sound,” McIntosh has not only witnessed history, it has shaped it. With McIntosh, customers have the ability to create their own premium audio experience – and truly live their music.

Name: Sonus faber
Description:
Sonus faber è un'azienda italiana che produce diffusori acustici Hi-Fi e Hi-End.

Sonus Faber has a policy of constant research inspired by the past; it draws on the ancient art of lute-making in the design of the acoustic cabinets and uses modern technology for the transducers.

Name: Monitor Audio Group
Description: Monitor Audio Group is an independent, engineering-led British audio company, designing and manufacturing a range of products with a single purpose: to give customers an enhanced listening experience, at every price point. The company has assembled a world-class team of audio engineers, product designers and manufacturing specialists with a wide range of skills, knowledge, experience and backgrounds, who work across the Group’s Monitor Audio, Roksan and Blok brands.

Name: Tymphany
Description:
Tymphany is a renowned audio design and manufacturing powerhouse that specializes in consumer audio, professional audio, conference systems, automotive audio, and component business. The company's unique holistic X-IN-1 technology pool, which includes transducers, amplifiers, DSP/software, acoustic system design, and mechanical solutions, enables them to design and manufacture high-quality audio products that improve user experience and provide the best sound per dollar.

With state-of-the-art R&D and manufacturing facilities in Europe, the USA, and Asia, the company boasts a dedicated team of over 5,000 highly skilled employees and 700 engineers who continuously push the boundaries of technology to remain at the forefront of the industry.

Name: Peerless-AV EMEA
Description:
Peerless-AV, a Peerless Industries, Inc. company, has over 80 years’ experience as a leading designer and manufacturer of audio visual solutions. 

In May 2009, Peerless-AV opened it European HQ following the merger of BBG Distribution with Peerless Industries. Its warehouse in Watford, UK, was recently expanded to 20,000 sq.ft.  A new warehouse facility also opened in Dubai in 2015 in response to rising demand for Peerless-AV’s mounts and solutions from the Middle East, Africa and CIS.

Peerless-AV is responsible for multiple industry firsts and is fast becoming a true solutions provider. There are over 3,600 products in the company's portfolio, including flat panel mounts, projector mounts, digital signage and video wall solutions, environmental enclosures, trolleys and stands, indoor/outdoor kiosks, fully-sealed outdoor displays and a full assortment of accessories. 

Peerless-AV is focused building quality relationships with distributors, resellers, installers, integrators and OEMs, creating reliable mounting solutions that save time and money by being quick and simple to install. By adopting a consultative approach involving personalised, quality time with clients, Peerless-AV is trusted worldwide and stands out from the rest.

For more information, visit our website: http://www.peerless-av.com

Name: AV Stumpfl
Description:
AV Stumpfl is an award-winning Austrian company that designs, manufactures and markets a range of high-performance mobile and fixed installation projection screens, as well as PIXERA media server and show control systems for the professional AV and wider entertainment industry. 

As a family business, its founders started the company out of a passion for the advancement of presentation and installation technologies. The product range is warranted for 24/7 usage and supported by a global partner network.
Location: Wallern an der Trattnach, Upper Austria

Name: B-Tech AV Mounts
Description:
Established in London in 1972, B-Tech AV Mounts is an industry leader in the design and manufacture of professional AV mounting solutions, whose products are recognised worldwide for their innovation, robustness, reliability, ease of install and design aesthetics. B-Tech AV Mounts not only offers one of the most extensive but also the most versatile and adaptable mounting ranges available from any mounting solutions provider. 

Our mounting solutions cover all AV requirements ranging from small, single screens to large format displays, projectors, speakers, interactive touchscreens and UC equipment, as well as large, multi-screen LCD and dvLED video walls and digital signage. Designed to stringent TUV and UL safety standards by B-Tech's in-house team of engineers, our products are available as wall or ceiling mounts, desktop stands or as freestanding, mobile or bolt-down floor stands. Winners of multiple accolades including AV Awards' AV Manufacturer of the Year crown, B-Tech AV Mounts products are found in prestigious hotels, shopping malls, government facilities, corporate offices, sports stadia, restaurants, airports and conference facilities worldwide. 

The B-Tech AV Mounts brand includes the following key sub-brands; System X, Mode-AL, System 2 and System V. These are specialised ranges that solve specific mounting requirements and have become installer favourite, market-leading solutions. All can be purchased as complete, readymade solutions, or ordered in component form so that users can tailor a solution exactly to their needs.

With an extensive distributor and reseller network, B-Tech products have been sold in more than 150 countries worldwide, with B-Tech facilities serving markets on every continent out of the following locations: UK, Belgium, Germany, Spain, Dubai, USA, China, Singapore, South Korea and Vietnam.

Name: digiLED
Description:
With decades of hands-on experience, industry-first technologies, and unmatched support, we help system integrators and our clients deliver the world’s most ambitious LED screen projects with confidence.

We cover the globe from offices in the UK, USA, Europe, and Asia - backed by over 375,000 sqm of LED installed worldwide. Our flagship showrooms, The Pixel Depot in Dorking and Las Vegas (a top North American hub), give integrators hands-on demos, content testing, training, and full project backup from design right through to install and aftercare.

Name: Innovation Platform Solutions (IPS)
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of IPS - a pioneering added-value audiovisual distributor serving the GCC and Egypt. Our team comprises highly experienced AV engineers and experts who are committed to transforming the distribution business model and enhancing the performance of both private and public sectors through the gradual adoption of cutting-edge technologies.

At IPS, we specialize in supplying the latest technologies, utilizing the latest innovations in digital information technologies, training, and qualification. Our focus is on providing the best solutions to our clients, ensuring they have access to the most advanced and effective tools and equipment to improve their performance and achieve their goals.

Our team's expertise and dedication have helped us establish ourselves as a leading AV distributor in the region, serving clients across a range of industries, including hospitality, education, healthcare, and more. With our extensive network and strong partnerships with leading global brands, we are well-positioned to provide our clients with unparalleled access to the latest and most innovative AV solutions.

Stay updated on our latest products and services, industry news and trends, and thought leadership content by following our LinkedIn page. We look forward to connecting with you and helping you achieve your business goals through our cutting-edge AV solutions.

Name: Inogeni
Description:
INOGENI was founded in 2005 as an AV products design house. INOGENI has been designing and manufacturing best-in-class quality video capture and mixing devices to enhance video conferencing through the use of multiple cameras and video sources in Canada since 2015.  

The INOGENI products provide better and more customized online communications for CODEC and Soft-CODEC without any drivers to install. New technology product development is typically driven by the needs of our customers. Applications for our products include video conferencing, lecture capture, medical imaging, virtual reality production and many other needs that require multiple video sources. INOGENI products enable better and more customized online communications with programs like Teams, Zoom, Cisco Webex, Compatible with Q-SYS, MAXHUB, Lenovo, Logitech, BARCO’s ClickShare Conference, AIRTAME, MAGO, Google Meet, vMix,  YouTube, Wirecast, Livestream and more. 

“Bring your own device,” aka BYOD, has become more than a trend in hybrid workplaces, it's the new reality around the globe. INOGENI products combine with systems like CISCO Room Kits, Lenovo,Poly or BARCO ClickShare Conference to enable a better immersive conferencing experience. With INOGENI products, anyone can connect easily and quickly with all the conferencing equipment in a room and control it:  multiple cameras, conference sytem video and audio sources or any Soft-Codec like Microsoft Teams.  Less hardware complexity. No drivers, no setup! Versatile! Compatible with all apps. INOGENI comes with a simple solution that connects all peripherals (HDMI, SDI, USB 2&3, etc.) 

INOGENI products are distributed to hundreds of international distributors and resellers in more than 75 countries, in North America, Europe, Asia and Africa. All INOGENI products are proudly designed and manufactured in Canada. 

Our award-winning technical support team is available virtually to support any need that arises during installation.

Name: tvONE Ltd.
Description:
tvONE is a world class developer and manufacturer of video conversion and AV signal distribution technology, with offices in the US, and R&D and manufacturing facilities in the UK. tvONE provides a complete line-up of products and services for the professional AV, broadcast video, and digital signage markets. tvONE now encompasses three superior brands under one umbrella, tvONE, Magenta Research and Green Hippo.

The tvONE brand specializes in video, audio, and multimedia processing equipment, based on its proprietary CORIO video conversion technology. Products include all-in-one system solutions, windowing processors, scan converters, seamless switchers, video scalers, up/down/cross converters, analogue-digital converters, including SD/HD-SDI, HDMI, and DVI, format converters, and standard converters.

Magenta Research is the industry-recognized brand for the transmission, switching, and flexible distribution of multi-format video, audio, and auxiliary signals over fiber and Cat-X cabling. Products include AV extenders, distribution amplifiers and matrix switchers for DVI, HDMI, VGA, and component, composite, s-video, audio, USB, and RS-232 signals.

Green Hippo is one of the leading players in media manipulation and 3D Mapping. The brand’s award winning Hippotizer range can be found providing real-time video playback for TV and Broadcast, Concert Tours, Installations, Theatre and Live Events worldwide.

For further details visit www.tvone.com and www.green-hippo.com.

Name: Avenue Sound Pvt Ltd
Description:
Avenue Sound specializes in performing custom installations and integrations of Audio/Video and Home Automation Solutions for Residential, Commercial and Marine Landscapes.

We can “Rock Your Boat” or set up a “Dedicated Home Cinema” in your Residence. We can make sure your Amazon Alexa reads your morning schedule to you while you’re having breakfast and ensure that WiFi dead spot you have in the corner of your bedroom disappears for good. In short, we are all about “Custom Integration”. Avenue Sound is focused on customizing each client’s lifestyle to meet their individual needs.

We love a challenge and ensure our entire team is trained to successfully navigate any project we are appointed to integrate. Our team includes HAA Level II Calibrators for Audio and Acoustic Design, Control4 Certified Home Automation Specialists and a skilled group of Project Managers and Installation specialists to ensure every project is handled systematically. We ensure our team does not take any shortcuts and follows a tried and tested implementation process to ensure each project gets the attention it deserves.

From the Sales and Education Process to the Design Stage and Finally the Implementation, we assure our talented team will execute professionally and on schedule with documentation properly presented along each step of the way.

Shoot us an email or Give us a Call, let us sit down and help you design the perfect customized solution for your upcoming project. Our dedicated team of sales specialists can meet with you, understand your requirements, and walk you through an exciting audition at any of our showrooms to let you experience our solutions first hand. We offer free home consultations and our design team is always ready to help out with architectural drawings or layouts to help facilitate your interior design or architectural team. At Avenue sound we love feedback, so please don’t hesitate to reach out to us for any questions or concerns.

Name: AUDAC
Description:
AUDAC provides a complete range of professional audio equipment, including amplifiers, speakers, (conference) microphones and much more. We design, manufacture and distribute an extensive line of products.

Being successful in business requires exceptional products that meet the needs of the end user. We try to improve our equipment by listening to feedback given by the many installers and dealers that use our products daily. Our mission is to make high-quality products for a competitive price. Our corporate objective is to continue to grow within the audio busines, further establishing our position as a major international manufacturer.

AUDAC makes sure that quality comes first and is very proud of the high regard customers have for our products. We owe this to our qualified engineers and technicians, who continuously upgrade our products to incorporate newer technologies and state-of-the-art materials.

Make sure you don't miss out on any updates. Follow us at:
http://facebook.com/AUDACaudio 
http://youtube.com/audacaudio 
http://twitter.com/AudacAudio

Name: Pleora Technologies
Description:
Connectivity Solutions for Real-Time Imaging

When performance matters, global imaging device designers, manufacturers, and integrators turn to Pleora for proven solutions, systems expertise, and standards knowledge.

Shorten time-to-market. Reduce risks. Lower costs.

We Are Innovative Market Leaders

Pleora is the leader in real-time connectivity for industrial automation, security & defense, and medical imaging applications with 25 years of expertise in vision applications with our growing global team. Our hardware and software solutions are built for performance, enabling low-latency, real-time video and data transport in 1000s of unique systems.

We are continuously investing in enhancements to our technology platform with new solutions that address higher bandwidths, usability, and system connectivity demands backed by professional services expertise to customize our offerings for unique requirements. Pleora is a reliable and responsive partner with consistent on-time delivery, dependable support, lifecycle management and a dedication to continuous quality improvement.

Our deployed solutions have the capacity to transmit over 20 billion gigabits of data per day from cameras, edge and embedded devices, and X-ray panels to processors and displays. Pleora’s eBUS SDK platform provides the essential building blocks necessary to develop high-performance applications that consume minimal CPU resources across the widest range of operating systems.

 Pleora Technologies Inc. • 450 March Road, Suite 500 • Kanata, Ontario • K2K 3K2

Name: Almoe Digital Solutions
Description: Middle East’s largest trusted partner for Audio Visual & IT Business Solutions. Established in 1995, we have been at the forefront of the distribution and integration of the latest audio-visual and information technology products and services.

Name: HAVI DESIGN INDIA LLP
Description: A Professional Audio Video Integration Company working primarily in Commercial Spaces like Educational Institutions , Corporates , Hospitality, Government Buildings, Retail, Stadiums, Theme Parks , Auditoriums and many more

Name: Ideal Solution Company
Description:
Ideal Solution is a Saudi company established in 2016 with 16 years of experience armed with science and a clear vision towards its future, which helped the company to grow significantly and build a strong customer base within a short period of time.
With the accumulated experience gained by the company in this field, it was not only satisfied with providing services related to audio-visual systems, but also strongly contributed to the development of these systems to provide customized solutions for each individual customer.
The company's activity extends to include providing customized consultancy, linking and updating audio-visual communication systems, supplying and installing huge screens, whether internal, external or wall screens, as well as sound systems and Booking systems for Conference and Meeting Rooms.

Name: SCT (Sound Control Technologies)
Description:
Who We Are
Founded in 1987, Sound Control Technologies (SCT) delivers camera, codec, video bar, and tabletop solutions that simplify the toughest AV connectivity challenges. Built in the U.S. and trusted worldwide, our products are known for their reliability, performance, and easy installation. 

At the heart of every solution is our proprietary SCTLink technology—delivering power, video, audio, control, USB, and Ethernet over a single CAT cable, up to 100 meters. It's how we reduce clutter, cut install time, and bring unmatched flexibility to professional AV environments. 

What We Do
SCT designs purpose-built extension kits and tabletop BYOM solutions that support every major codec, video bar, and PTZ camera manufacturer. Our systems provide seamless connectivity and reliable power delivery to endpoints like cameras, video bars and touch panels—no extra outlets or local power supplies required. 

That’s our not-so-secret sauce: power and performance, over one cable, with no programming required. 

For more information, visit us at www.soundcontrol.net.

Name: PPDS - Professional Display Solutions
Description: PPDS proudly holds the world’s exclusive rights to develop, manufacture, and market all Philips branded professional displays, digital signage, LED displays, videowalls, monitors, software, and innovations. Representing TPV Technology, PPDS combines TP Vision and MMD to serve every professional industry with total solutions that enable people to connect, communicate, create, and collaborate. Through a personal approach in working with all partners and end-customers, PPDS is empowering vision without boundaries by delivering tailored innovations designed to bring every story to life. PPDS is a global tech company that operates from its European Headquarters in Amsterdam, the Netherlands.

Name: Wisdom Audio
Description:
Wisdom Audio creates high-performance entertainment systems defined by precision engineering, expert craftsmanship, and a deep commitment to sonic excellence. Our planar magnetic and Line Source technologies serve as the foundation for a range of meticulously engineered loudspeakers; each designed to reveal extraordinary clarity, dynamics, and detail. Many of our products can be tailored in custom sizes, finishes ensuring every solution is perfectly matched to its architectural environment. Every product is created with exceptional care and discipline, and is proudly designed, engineered, and manufactured in the U.S.
We are honored to collaborate with the world’s leading custom integrators, architects, interior designers, and engineers on some of the most remarkable residences and superyachts across the globe. Together, we deliver immersive, unforgettable music and film experiences worthy of the most discerning clients.

Name: FOR-A INDIA PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
FOR-A India Private Limited is one of the largest agency houses representing / distributing (Exclusively) Broadcast Equipment from some of the World-renowned companies. It’s a 100% subsidiary company of FOR-A Company Limited, Japan, which is a renowned manufacturer of Broadcast Equipment’s.
Founded in 1971 by Mr. Keizo Kiyohara, FOR-A is a worldwide, industry-leading manufacturer, offering a wide range of broadcast, video and audio production products and solutions for a variety of industries. Our first product was a video timer and since those early days our customers have come to rely on the FOR-A brand for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer support.

For over 45 years, we continue to offer future-ready, cost effective, advanced technology solutions including HD, 4K/UHD, 8K and 12G production processing solutions, HDR/WCG and IP-based products. FOR-A delivers the widest range of products including: Color Correctors, Video Switchers, Routing Switchers, HD/4K Keyers, Frame Rate Converters, Multi-Channel Signal Processors, Multi Viewers, Video Servers, 4K/HD Test Signal Generators, IP Encoders, Decoders, Downstream Keyers, File-Based Products, Character Generators, High Speed and Super Low Light Cameras and much more. FOR-A India is a renowned specialist company in providing broadcasting and communication solution to the Indian Market as well as Bangladesh & Sri Lankan market with a major thrust on video equipment. Its endeavor is to help end users in capturing events as it is without any distortions and delays. Complementing its superior product range, the company offers a well-knit marketing and services network. 
Through a system of regional offices in Mumbai, Kolkata, Thiruvananthapuram, Chennai and the head office in Noida, the company supports a nation-wide customer base. Prompt response and a professional approach have been the hallmark of the company’s customer support efforts.

Name: ROBE Lighting France
Description:
Chez Robe Lighting, nous sommes avant tout des passionnés de lumière.
Basés en République tchèque, nous concevons et fabriquons des projecteurs motorisés pensés pour accompagner celles et ceux qui créent des expériences visuelles : techniciens, régisseurs, concepteurs lumière, artistes.

Sur plus de 130 000 m² de site intégré, nous maîtrisons chaque étape en interne de la R&D à l’assemblage pour garantir des solutions fiables, innovantes et adaptées aux réalités du terrain.
Tous nos projecteurs sont conçus et fabriqués en Europe, avec un haut niveau d’exigence technique et une attention constante à la qualité.

Nous sommes présents dans plus de 100 pays grâce à un réseau de distribution solide et des filiales implantées localement : en France, en Allemagne, au Royaume-Uni, aux États-Unis, au Moyen-Orient et à Singapour.

Robe Lighting France, installée à Villepinte, représente la marque en France ainsi qu’en Afrique du Nord (Maroc, Algérie, Tunisie).
Nous travaillons main dans la main avec les professionnels pour les accompagner dans leurs projets et leurs défis techniques.

Notre engagement : être à l’écoute, comprendre vos besoins et concevoir des outils qui vous permettent de repousser les limites de la création lumière.

Name: Ish Kumar and Company LLP
Description: fastest growing audio accessories brand that is truly homegrown - made in India and made for India

Name: Turtle AV
Description:
Turtle AV is a proudly Australian electronics manufacturer, based out of Melbourne. 

We’re a friendly bunch of guys on a mission to make rock solid, feature rich products for the AV market, and specialising in AV over IP using formats such as Dante AV-A, Dante Audio, H.265/HEVC, and more. 

Turtle AV is truly committed to being the best possible partner we can to everyone involved. Our people, our customers, our distributors, our resellers and integrators, our suppliers, and our industry partners. We value human connections and are genuinely excited to be on this journey.

Name: Marantz
Description:
Saul Marantz, the legend behind our audio experiences, was a true pioneer of Hi-Fi.

Surrounded by music, Marantz found that a home music system that met his exacting standards in the early 1950's just did not exist. He envisioned a completely new architectural idea for sound reproduction, and employing his skill in electrical engineering, built the proof of his concept - the Audio Consolette, a Hi-Fi pre-amplifier designed for the home.

In 1953, Saul's passion project became a business and the Marantz Audio Company was born from his home in New York.

The spirit of Marantz has transcended geographies in the decades since. Our products are engineered by some of the most experienced in the world, and they are expertly tuned to the highest standards by the finest experts in Japan.
Throughout Europe, Asia, and the Americas, we support our customers with anything they need.

Today, wherever you are in the world you can reach out and touch Marantz.

Name: Funktion One Research Ltd.
Description: Funktion-One designs and manufacturers high-performance loudspeaker systems. The company was founded in 1992 by Tony Andrews and John Newsham - highly regarded designers and manufacturers, with numerous patents to their name. The duo, who were also responsible for establishing and leading Turbosound through the late-1970s, 1980s and early-1990s, are accredited with several generations of revolutionary loudspeaker designs, including the TMS-3, Flashlight, Floodlight, Resolution, Evolution and Vero systems. They are widely known for their pioneering work and ethos, which established many of the principles that subsequently became standard audio industry practice. The Funktion-One design team represents an unsurpassed pool of experience and expertise in the audio industry, having been consistent innovators in audio design, concert touring and sound installation for over 50 years. In addition to designing loudspeakers, Funktion-One’s engineers have produced and contributed to a number of investigative papers.

Name: HDBaseT Alliance
Description: The official Alliance committed to the advancement of  theHDBaseT standard, the only long-reach multimedia distribution technology with the ability to extend full uncompressed 4K@60 4:4:4, USB 2.0, Gigabit Ethernet, power, and controls up to 100m/328ft over standard Category cable.  With an ecosystem of over 200 Alliance members and thousands of interoperable products in market, HDBaseT is the Professional AV industry's premier connectivity solution.

Name: FONESTAR Sistemas S.A.
Description: Fonestar es una empresa europea especializada en soluciones de sonido profesional, megafonía y evacuación por voz. Con un firme compromiso con la calidad, el diseño y la innovación, desarrollamos productos bajo estrictos estándares europeos que garantizan fiabilidad y alto rendimiento. Nuestra presencia internacional abarca Europa, Asia, Latinoamérica y Oriente Medio, ofreciendo soluciones adaptadas a múltiples sectores, desde espacios comerciales hasta infraestructuras críticas. A través de un enfoque basado en la excelencia técnica y el servicio personalizado, en Fonestar nos aseguramos de proporcionar las mejores soluciones para cada proyecto.

Name: TAIDEN
Description:
TAIDEN INDUSTRIAL CO., LTD, established in 1996, is a high-tech enterprise specialized in R&D, manufacturing and worldwide sales of modern digital conference systems. TAIDEN is one of the world's leading conference system manufacturers, as well as China's largest conference system manufacturer. 

TAIDEN is the member of ICCA (International Congress & Convention Association) for technical assistance on international conferencing.

TAIDEN has won high reputation on a global scale for its excellent quality products and high performance. 

TAIDEN products have been sold in in 110 foreign countries and regions such as the USA, UK, Russia, Italy and many more. Thousands of TAIDEN installations were completed for governments, hotels, conference centers, enterprises and colleges all over the world.

Some of the prestigious projects include: United Nations Headquarters, IMF-World Bank Annual Meetings(Washington), ITU Plenipotentiary Conference 2010(Mexico), United Nations Environment Forum in Bali, the Beijing Olympic Games, Expo 2010 Shanghai, Boao Forum For Asia, APEC Leaders' and Ministerial Meeting in Chile, EU Committee of the Regions Meeting in Cyprus , and the Six-party Talks on North Korea Nuclear Issue in Beijing. With successful solutions for many important conferences, TAIDEN has shaped up as one of the most competitive brands in global conference system market.

TAIDEN will remain committed to customer requirements, persist with technology innovation and expand its international activities to become the world's leading enterprise in providing state-of-the-art conference systems.

Name: Magewell
Description:
Founded in 2011, Magewell designs and develops hardware and software for video and audio capture, conversion and streaming. With guiding principles of continuous innovation and providing outstanding customer service, Magewell has earned a strong reputation for the exceptional quality, performance, reliability and cost-effectiveness of its solutions. 

Our solutions are widely deployed around the world for applications including live event streaming, broadcast production, video conferencing, medical imaging, lecture capture, surveillance, gaming and more. 

Our products are available globally through our valued channel partners including distributors, resellers and systems integrators. In addition to empowering end users, our products are also incorporated into a wide range of third-party solutions on an OEM basis by other industry-leading manufacturers.

Name: ROBE Lighting France
Description:
Chez Robe Lighting, nous sommes avant tout des passionnés de lumière.
Basés en République tchèque, nous concevons et fabriquons des projecteurs motorisés pensés pour accompagner celles et ceux qui créent des expériences visuelles : techniciens, régisseurs, concepteurs lumière, artistes.

Name: PureLink
Description:
PureLink is a global leader and manufacturer of professional AV solutions. Since 2002, our deep commitment to engineering excellence and innovation has powered cutting-edge installations across military and government agencies, healthcare facilities, Fortune 500 enterprises, and mission-critical environments worldwide. From AV distribution and extension to control, collaboration, and AV over IP, PureLink continues to set the standard for performance, reliability, and scalability in the Pro AV industry.

PureLink is the original pioneer of true cross-platform matrix switching—an industry first that redefined digital signal routing. We were the first to engineer a fully digital, "anything-in, anything-out" matrix platform capable of seamless signal switching across any format, architecture, or scale. This foundational innovation—refined over two decades—remains a cornerstone of high-performance AV infrastructure in military command centers, federal agencies, cruise lines, and entertainment venues around the world.

But our legacy of innovation extends far beyond matrix switching. PureLink is also a leading force in AV over IP, with solutions that bring high-performance, ultra-low latency distribution to networked environments. Our award-winning iCON control and automation solutions simplify even the most complex deployments, while our PushGo pre-programmed, plug-and-play meeting room packages set new standards for ease of use in collaborative spaces. From core infrastructure to intuitive user experiences, PureLink continues to shape the future of AV with technologies designed for lasting impact and operational excellence.

Name: AKAI
Description:
In the heart of Japan, where traditions intertwine with technological marvels, the name AKAI transcends the realm of mere electronics. In Japanese, "Akai" (赤井) translates to "red well," symbolizing a source of inspiration and vitality. The founders, Masukichi Akai and his son Saburo, envisioned their brand as a wellspring of innovation, a vibrant force that would breathe life into the world of audio.

Back in 1946, AKAI Electric Company Ltd. burst onto the scene, crafting audio wonders with Japanese precision. People worldwide fell for AKAI's quality – it was more than just gadgets; it was a feeling.

Fast forward to the 2000s, and AKAI faced tough times. But like life, AKAI bounced back. Grande Holdings, the guardian of AKAI's legacy, decided it was time to shine again. In 2003, they teamed up with Samsung, the tech giant, to give AKAI a makeover. The "red well" flowed into homes with more than just audio – think air conditioners, vacuum cleaners, and fridges, all with the AKAI touch.

The 2010s marked the smartphone era, and AKAI joined forces with Chinese wizards like Gionee. AKAI smartphones weren't just gadgets; they were a mix of tradition and today, reaching into pockets and homes worldwide.

Now, it's 2024, and AKAI's ready for a new adventure – Car Audio. "Your Drive, Your Ways, Your Entertainment" isn't just words; it's an invitation to join AKAI on a unique driving journey. From Japan to your car, AKAI's story goes on – where every drive is a personalized symphony!

Name: Desmond's Tiki Tube Amps
Description:
Hifi stereos and speakers built into carved tiki heads.  Each one is 100% handmade and unique.
Desmond Bowe LinkedIn Resume:
Artist | Maker | Founder of Tiki Tube Amps
Santa Monica, California
After 15 years in tech as a self-taught programmer, team leader, and podcast host, I left the screen behind to reconnect with my hands and my soul. Today, I’m the founder of Tiki Tube Amps, a handcrafted fusion of sculpture and stereo built with vintage vacuum tubes and timeless craftsmanship.
Each amp is a one-of-a-kind piece, carved from sustainably sourced wood and wired entirely by hand. No mass production. No shortcuts. Just slow, soulful art that blends analog sound with fire, music, and the spirit of Tiki.
My workshop in Santa Monica is a space where beauty matters and the creative process is sacred. Whether I’m carving, designing circuits, or just reflecting, I believe great work comes from stillness, joy, and intention.
I’m not building a product, I’m creating experiences.
Because when something is made with love and spirit, you feel it, and that feeling? That’s what moves us.

Name: Taylorleds UK & Ireland
Description:
Taylorleds is an innovative, integrity-minded joint venture created to provide State of the Art LED products. Absen owns 80% of Taylorleds and manufactures most of Taylorleds LED Display products while Design, R&D, and QC are handled by Taylorleds. Absen is a public-listed Chinese LED Display manufacturer.



In 2018, Mike Yan was in charge of product solutions and key account customers at Absen Inc. in Orlando. Having managed several key account partnerships, Mike found that while large public companies like Absen are good at standardization and mass production, catering to customer's needs has been a weak spot due to the large organization and complicated procedures. Mike then approached the founder of Absen (Hansen Ding) with the idea of creating a new brand 'Taylorleds' that lies closer to the customers. At that time, Hansen was also looking for multi-brand strategy to grow Absen's market share and quickly supported Mike's idea of Taylorleds. Absen took an 80% ownership in Taylorleds and in return provided funding, experienced technical team and manufacturing support.



Since 2018, Taylorleds has built a team of professionals that focus on creating the best LED experience for our partners, and developed over a dozen product platforms by incorporating key customer’s feedback into the design. Taylorleds products have been installed in thousands of applications including Kennedy Center, US Chamber of Commerce, Pacha Ibiza and multiple Hard Rock Casinos.

Name: IT12035
Description:
In un mondo dove la rapidità è la norma e l'apparenza spesso prevale, IT12035 si distingue per l'arte di creare spazi che vanno oltre il comune. Non ci limitiamo a realizzare impianti; plasmiamo atmosfere, avvolgendo gli ambienti in una magia sottile che si percepisce ma non si vede. La nostra filosofia integra la tecnologia non come mero strumento, ma come alleato nella creazione di esperienze uniche, avvolgenti ed emozionali.

Ogni ambiente ha una sua anima, una vibrazione unica che IT12035 raccoglie e amplifica, trasformando gli spazi in luoghi che raccontano storie. Ogni soluzione è studiata per rispondere perfettamente alle esigenze di chi la vive, stimolando i sensi e evocando emozioni profonde. La nostra missione è offrire un'esperienza percettiva totale, un equilibrio armonioso tra estetica, funzionalità e un tocco poetico che rende ogni ambiente non solo bello, ma vivo.

La tecnologia, nelle mani di IT12035, non è mai fredda o distaccata; si integra profondamente con il progetto, amplificando la bellezza di ciò che ci circonda. Le soluzioni più avanzate diventano strumenti attraverso cui i sogni dei clienti prendono forma, trasformando gli ambienti in esperienze multisensoriali che coinvolgono corpo, mente e anima.

Per IT12035, il design non è semplicemente un concetto visivo, ma un'esperienza completa che va oltre la superficie, plasmando spazi che non solo si vedono ma si sentono, che non solo si abitano ma si vivono pienamente.

Description:
Honsenn is a high-tech audio enterprise with expertise in design, development & manufacturing of Headphones and earbuds, and various other audio products. Our products have gone in hands of millions of audio lovers and audio experts through various brands we have catered to in our short but rich history of two decades.

With a 30 strong engineering team of Acoustic, Mechanical and Electrical engineers, we have designed, developed and manufactured some of the leading headphone models for many premium audio brands around the world. Our state-of-art manufacturing plant is strategically located in Dongguan City, in the Pearl River Delta (PRD) region which is the heart of tech-manufacturing and Product development for the whole world. Our 400 highly skilled workers craft products for music lovers around the world, with precision & love!

We provide Design & Development services from the concept stage (ODM) with the highest confidentiality and we do the manufacturing for the same. In addition, our inhouse design team develops our own models regularly to offer to our clients for OEM. All of this is done keeping sustainability and environmental responsibility in mind.

We have co-operation contracts with most of the leading semi-conductor suppliers and we keep sufficient amount of chipsets in stock to make sure that the production is consistent. We provide headphones and earbuds with multiple solutions such as, Qualcomm, SmartLink, Pixart, Realtek, BES, WuQi, JL, Airoha to name some.

China’s national TV channel CCTV has showcased and interviewed Honsenn as one of the leading enterprises for technology in the nation. We owe our fast growth to our people. Facilities, training and welfare of our employees is always our topmost priority. We exchange love with the people we work with, and we are open for new talents to compliment our continuous growth.

You might not know Honsenn, but there is a high possibility that if you love music, you might have used one of our products!

Name: Indipro Tools
Description:
Indipro Tools is a renowned provider within the filmmaking industry, specializing in high-quality power solutions designed to meet the rigorous demands of professional settings. This comprehensive range of products includes everything from batteries and chargers to power cables, conversion adapters, and specialized power supplies that guarantee a reliable energy source for cameras and lighting on set.

Batteries and Power Solutions:
Indipro offers a vast selection of batteries, including V-mount and Gold-mount types, catering to different camera systems and setups. The battery solutions are complemented by dual chargers, portable chargers, and multi-unit charging stations that offer fast and efficient charging capabilities, ensuring minimal downtime on set.

Cables and Adapters:
The company's extensive range of cables includes coiled D-Tap cables, USB power cables, and specific proprietary connectors for various camera brands such as Canon, Sony, Panasonic, and Blackmagic. These cables are designed to provide power from the batteries directly to the devices, ensuring camera systems and accessories are seamlessly powered throughout production.

On-Camera Power Supplies:
Indipro power supplies are crafted to plug directly into cameras or mount onto rigs, providing uninterrupted power for extended periods.

Professional Repair Services
Indipro takes pride in its top-notch professional repair services, offering expert maintenance and fixing for an array of batteries and tripods. Our experienced technicians ensure your gear meets the highest standards of functionality and reliability, so you're always ready for action. 

Duplication Services
IndiPro Tools provides premier duplication services, ensuring high-quality and efficient content replication for all your media needs. From small projects to large-scale productions, our state-of-the-art technology guarantees precise duplications with quick turnaround.

Name: Shivansh Electronics
Description:
Hello, and thank you for visiting.
Shivansh Electronics was founded by Mr. Gopal Das Deb, a renowned live sound engineer from Raja Electric, Kolkata, who served as the Chief Sound Engineer for Doordarshan and worked with legendary artists such as Asha Bhonsle, Shreya Ghoshal, Sonu Nigam, Zubin Garg, Arati Mukherjee, Haimanti Shukla, Hariharan, Anup Jalota, and many more.
With over four decades of experience in professional audio, Mr. Gopal Das Deb pioneered several industry trends in Eastern India — from being the first to introduce Audio-Technica microphones in the eastern part of India, to distributing Sennheiser (2008–2012), AVID audio interfaces, and launching Harman's VT Line-Array systems here. He also played a pivotal role in popularizing Yamaha Digital Consoles and pro audio segment as a distributor as well as by offering hands-on training between 2014 and 2020.
Currently, Shivansh Electronics proudly serves as the Eastern India distributor for cutting-edge professional audio brands including MOTU & PEERLESS AUDIO.
I’m Sarbojit Das Deb, currently pursuing my Economics degree at Jadavpur University, and managing the operations and expansion of Shivansh Electronics full-time.
My role focuses on:
-> Marketing & Product Promotion across digital platforms
-> Sales Strategy & Client Relationships
-> End-to-End Brand Representation & Demonstration
-> Driving Awareness and Growth for our Partner Brands in Eastern India
With a deep-rooted passion for pro audio and a modern approach to branding and outreach, I’m committed to carrying forward the legacy while building an even stronger ecosystem for artists, engineers, educators, and integrators.
This isn’t just business for me, it’s a lifelong pursuit to become a well-rounded audio professional, someone who can bridge the gap between engineering precision and creative vision.
Let’s collaborate, not just for transactions, but for transformation in how sound is delivered, experienced & understood.

We achieve this through a focus on R&D, resulting in innovative technological solutions combined with a holistic design philosophy where every choice is considered in the bigger picture. The result is loudspeakers that excel in every aspect, conveying the message exactly as the artist intended.

Our mission
Build loudspeakers that have an incredible emotional impact, able to create a very real and palpable holographic soundstage, with beyond-wall stretching musical bliss and realism, removing the slightest awareness of the actual audio system and fully transporting the listener to the best spot in the musical venue.

Description:
Welcome to RCA Pro! With over 100 years of experience, RCA is a trusted brand name in the USA, and we are excited to introduce our latest venture, RCA Pro.

At RCA Pro, we are passionate about delivering top-notch audio solutions to professionals and enthusiasts alike. We are proud to unveil an entirely new line of high-quality microphones and speakers that embody the perfect blend of innovation and superior sound quality.

As a company, we are not only focused on the future, but also inspired by our rich heritage. We are thrilled to bring back the iconic RCA Ribbon microphones from the 1950s, reviving their legendary status and allowing musicians and audio professionals to experience studio-grade quality.

At RCA Pro, we believe in marrying old-school values with modern advancements. Our commitment to delivering outstanding audio solutions is backed by a deep understanding of the industry's needs and a passion for excellence. We are driven to revolutionize the audio world, ensuring that every product that bears our name is a testament to unrivaled quality and performance.

We invite you to join us on this exciting journey as we continue to push boundaries and set new standards in the audio industry. Name: Daft FM
Description:
Welcome to daft.fm, a music technology company dedicated to protecting the music industry & magnifying artists' creative potential through the use of cutting-edge software and technology.

We believe that the true power of music comes from the creativity and passion of the artists who make it. That's why we've developed a range of tools and resources to help musicians focus on their craft and bring their unique visions to life - without ever charging them a dime, or taking any % ownership of their work.

We're just here to enjoy, and help bring the best music to the world.

We do this is through the use of our proprietary artificial intelligence modeling & in-depth search engine optimization expertise that has allowed us to create a digital footprint that generates millions of visitors from organic search.

We leverage this massive base of distribution to help promote our artists, without ever taking a dime or a single percentage point of ownership from their music or royalties. Instead, we use our platform and audience to amplify the reach and impact of our artists' work, helping them to connect with new fans and grow their careers.

This approach allows us to offer a truly unique and valuable service to our artists, one that helps them to build and sustain a career in music, while maintaining complete control over their work and their income.

At daft.fm, we are committed to using technology to empower artists and help them succeed - no matter how the landscape changes, because we believe that technology has an expiration date, but music is forever.

Name: AudioLotus
Description:
AudioLotus is a professional audio equipment design, manufacture & install brand outfit of M/s. Rattle & Hum, which provides high-performance audio solutions alongside acoustical consulting services. Established in 1997, and officially incorporated in 2003, the company has a rich legacy & exposure in designing equipment, in the field of acoustics, electro-acoustics, electronics and power electronics.

The AudioLotus team has successfully designed, manufactured and installed audio solutions for over 150 of India’s top nightclubs, pubs, micro-breweries and restaurants and over 30 houses of worship across India & South-East Asia, fitness studios, educational institutions, recording studios & sound rental companies.

Perfection built over 35 years of collective experience, researching & developing high resolution professional audio equipment, is reflected in our superior workmanship, seamless design and most importantly our “signature” tone.

Our design center & Lab boasts of sophisticated measurement & prediction techniques, integration of automatic control theory, continuous & discrete mathematical modeling (aka FEA), and electro-acoustical network analysis and synthesis. Our Carpentry division is equipped with high precision woodworking tools & skill sets, whether manual or CNC and an integrated loudspeaker painting unit ensuring an industrial quality finish.

The company has carved a niche in the professional & commercial audio industry especially in the arena of nightclubs, bars & dance studios. Our repeat installs over the last 20+ years, are a testimony of unbroken customer trust based on sustained client delight, superior product quality, unfailing performance & reliability.

Name: Acoustic Power Lab
Description:
Acoustic Power Lab is at the forefront of developing signal processing and audio measurement tools for the professional audio industry. Our pioneering efforts include the use of Sound Power Frequency Response for loudspeaker evaluation and tuning, high-resolution Time Domain Analysis, even in real-time work, and Intermodulation Distortion evaluation in the form of distortion-frequency curves. Our mission is to provide advanced tools to professionals to achieve precision and excellence in sound.
A new project is about a brand new type of microphone with very high directivity, allowing it to be placed quite far from performers, orchestras, or choirs while still capturing a natural sound balance and significantly reducing post-production time. It is ideal for video recordings of performances—no visible mics or stands in the orchestra. It was used to record Gustav Mahler’s 3rd Symphony, performed by the Latvian National Symphony Orchestra and two choirs. We already have first paying customer for a set of seven microphones from Tampere. The solution is so radically unique that it has no direct competitors on the market.
APL is looking for a Business Co-founder, to drive strategic growth and shape innovative development roadmaps in pro audio, leading business development, forge key partnerships, and champion market penetration for our cutting-edge high directivity microphone solutions.

Name: CueTime
Description:
CueTime is the World’s First All-In-One Confidence Monitor with Built-In Smart Speaker Timer

A Revolutionary New Tool Set to Transform Live Event Production Workflows Worldwide.

CueTime, the world’s first confidence monitor with an integrated smart speaker timer is setting a new standard in live event production technology. Built by event professionals for event professionals, CueTime seamlessly combines two essential tools—confidence monitors and speaker timers—into a single, sleek, state-of-the-art system designed to simplify workflows, reduce setup time, and increase precision on stage.

Developed to meet the demanding needs of high-impact events—from corporate conferences and keynotes to live broadcasts and arena tours—CueTime is the first product of its kind to offer real-time wireless control through a dedicated mobile app (iOS & Android) and web-based interface. This allows show callers, producers, and AV teams to manage time cues remotely, send visual alerts to speakers, and synchronize multiple units without the mess of cables or risk of miscommunication.

“We created CueTime because we were tired of outdated, clunky setups and disconnected systems,” said Eyal Simko, creator of CueTime. “There’s been little innovation in speaker timing technology—until now. CueTime is built to meet the pace and precision today’s productions demand.”

Key Features of CueTime Include:
* Integrated Confidence Monitor + Timer: One unit, zero clutter
* Wireless App & Web Control: Real-time adjustments 
* Customizable Alerts: Visual alerts tailored to your show
* Sleek, Professional Design: Engineered for visibility, portability & durability
* Plug-and-Play Simplicity: No complicated setup or third-party devices needed

CueTime was designed for those seeking an upgrade to their existing gear. Its unique integration not only enhances the speaker experience but also gives control rooms, show callers, and tech teams unprecedented timing control and show fluidity.

K&W Audio - Calgary's Friendly Home Automation & Audio/Visual Experts

K&W Audio is your one-stop audio/video shop for smart home automation, home theater, and hi-fi stereo systems in Calgary, Alberta. Established in 1977, we've been providing quality, easy-to-use audio/video solutions with great friendly advice for over 45 years.

Our team of knowledgeable experts are passionate about delivering superior home entertainment experiences. We offer award-winning system design, installation, and integration services to create the perfect private home theater or audiophile listening room tailored just for you.

Home Theater Design & Installation

Transform your living space into a true cinematic experience with our home theater services. Choose from top projector brands like JVC, along with premium audio from Anthem, immersive seating from D-Box, and acoustically-optimized screens by Stewart Filmscreen. Our designers ensure every detail, from acoustics to lighting control, provides an unparalleled home cinema.

Hi-Fi Stereo Systems  

As an audiophile's paradise, our showroom features 8 dedicated sound rooms to demo elite stereo systems including brands like McIntosh, Marantz, Paradigm, Martin Logan, and more. Hear the difference of true high-fidelity audio reproduction with your favorite music before making a purchase.

Home Automation & Smart Home Design & Builds

Make your home smarter and more convenient with our home automation solutions. We are certified dealers for leading brands like Control4 and Lutron, providing seamless integration of lighting, climate, entertainment, security, and more into one intuitive system controlled by voice, remote, or smartphone.

Visit our store at 1424 4th Street SW in Calgary to experience our products firsthand. Our friendly experts are ready to help design the perfect audio/video or smart home system for your needs. Call today!

Name: Light Harmonic
Description:
Welcome to Light Harmonic, where we amplify your Tesla's audio experience to a whole new level. Our mission? Transforming every drive into a personalized concert, an immersive symphony on wheels.

We specialize in designing high-quality, custom car speakers that harmonize perfectly with your Tesla's unique acoustics. Our speakers are more than mere sound devices – they are a marriage of cutting-edge audio technology and detailed craftsmanship, tailored to each Tesla model's distinct cabin environment.

What sets us apart is our commitment to 'plug and play' compatibility. Using the same connectors as Tesla's OEM, our speakers offer a seamless, hassle-free installation experience, requiring no modification to your existing amplifier. Furthermore, our custom adapters activate your central tweeter using the signal from your midrange speaker, keeping things simple yet sophisticated.

Our pride and joy is our subwoofer, an optional extra for those wanting to take their sound to the next level. Recommended for installation in the rear trunk, it comes with a separate amplifier that elevates your vehicle's audio performance beyond standard.

At Light Harmonic, we go beyond product excellence. Our customer experience is paramount, and we strive to provide an engaging, supportive journey from order to installation and beyond. With direct shipping and efficient service, you'll be enjoying the high notes of your Tesla audio upgrade in no time.

Join us, and let's make your Tesla's sound as electrifying as its drive. Light Harmonic – turning your audio experience from 'pretty good' to 'out of this world'.

Name: Quist Windows
Description:
Quist Windows is a startup pioneering the future of building design with Virtual Windows. Our vision is simple yet transformative: replace traditional glass windows with advanced electronic displays that simulate the outdoor view in real time through a live camera feed.

Unlike conventional glass, Virtual Windows offer a range of advantages:

True flexibility — no need to align with the façade or limit wall materials; install virtually anywhere.

Privacy by design — enjoy natural views without compromising on security or personal space.

All-day clarity — high-quality outdoor visuals, whether it’s bright daylight or complete darkness.

Energy efficiency — reduce HVAC loads by eliminating glass-related thermal loss.

Resilient construction — walls remain stronger, safer, and better insulated than traditional glass designs.


By merging architectural freedom with cutting-edge display technology, QuistWindow is redefining what it means to bring the outside in. Our mission is to increase resilience, enhance indoor ambience, strengthen privacy, and drive energy efficiency—all while preserving the essential human connection to natural views.

QuistWindow is more than a product—it’s a platform for smarter, stronger, and more sustainable buildings.

Name: JOJO Technologies
Description:
JOJO Technology Co., Ltd. (''JOJO'') is a national high-tech enterprise specializing in the development, production and sales of automatic testing equipment. The company has been committed to working with its strategic partners and customers to improve the automation and information level of production, manufacturing and testing, so as to play a role in advancing the standardization of automated testing industry.
Headquartered in Shenzhen, JOJO was originally set up by a group of engineers, who are equipped with experienced engineering and technical know-how in the field of electronic manufacturing. Today, JOJO has owned dozens of invention patents and registered more than 20 software Copyrights, and in the meantime has been recognized as a national high-tech enterprise.
The company has been providing customers with a series of engineering technology services, covering from product R&D phase to mass production phase, mainly in ODM project R&D and new product introduction; quality management, process improvement and solution; all kinds of tailor-made connecting lines and test accessories, etc. In general, what JOJO do is focus on seeking solution to optimize and improve the existing test system for customers, thus further improving production efficiency and productivity for the customers.
After nearly 13 years of precipitation and development, under the leadership of the founder Mr. Dai Qiaofu, JOJO Technology has become a reliable partner of many branded customers in the consumer electronics industry, such as BOSE, Harman and Gopro. With more than ten years of customer accumulation, its products have been sold to more than 20 countries around the world, and established and maintained long-term cooperative relations with more customers. In the future, JOJO Technology will continue to look at the market at home and abroad, striving for becoming a leader in the field of audio automation testing.

Name: Gainlab Audio Ltd.
Description:
Gainlab Audio is a Budapest-based studio equipment manufacturer that has grown from the Gainlab Studio into an independent business specializing in high-end audio processing devices.

The two founding sound engineers, who were present from the beginning, gained extensive experience with various equipment through their work in the studio. Over time, they began modifying and upgrading these devices for maintenance purposes, as well as for expanding functionality and improving sound quality. This eventually led to the development of fully custom-built equipment for use in the studio. These devices were produced in limited quantities, featuring unique technical specifications, and were universally well-received by the studio’s staff and clients. It was during this period that the idea of producing a series of products emerged, but it required several years of product development and the addition of a third founder, who brought valuable sales experience and the necessary capital to initiate production. With a continuously expanding operational team, Gainlab Audio was introduced to the public at the end of 2020.

As a result of their dedicated work, the Dictator Dual Pentode Var-u Compressor received the “Gear of the Year 2021” award. The Empress 2×3 Band Tube EQ won the “Gear of the Year 2022” award and received a nomination for the prestigious SOS Awards 2023 from the renowned Sound On Sound magazine. Since then, Gainlab Audio devices have received numerous positive reviews and are used by industry celebrities in their daily work. The company strive to earn the trust placed in them and continue to bring their ideas to life, for their own fulfillment and, most importantly, for the delight of the general audience.

Name: Semmaa Audio
Description:
Over Semmaa Audio

Met 7 jaar ervaring in de audio-industrie heeft Semmaa Audio zich gepositioneerd als specialist in het ontwikkelen en produceren van handgemaakte high-end luidsprekers en luidsprekerkabels. Ons doel is om een exclusieve luisterervaring te bieden die de verwachtingen van de meest veeleisende audioliefhebbers overtreft.

Elke luidspreker en kabel wordt met de hand vervaardigd door onze vakmensen, die gebruikmaken van de beste materialen en geavanceerde technologieën. Dit vakmanschap, gecombineerd met onze passie voor geluid, zorgt ervoor dat onze producten niet alleen uitzonderlijke audiokwaliteit leveren, maar ook een visuele beleving creëren die elke audio-installatie naar een hoger niveau tilt.

Onze producten zijn ontworpen voor wie de ultieme audio-ervaring zoekt, of het nu gaat om professionele studio’s, high-end thuisinstallaties of gespecialiseerde audiovoorzieningen.

Wat Wij Doen:

Handgemaakte High-End Luidsprekers: Elke luidspreker wordt met zorg en precisie geassembleerd, zodat je een puur, helder en krachtig geluid ervaart.

Premium Handgemaakte Luidsprekerkabels: Onze kabels zijn ontworpen om de optimale signaaloverdracht te garanderen en zorgen voor een superieure audiokwaliteit.

Exclusieve Luisterervaring: We bieden niet alleen producten, maar creëren een totaalervaring die audioliefhebbers in staat stelt om elk detail in hun muziek te ontdekken.

Maatwerk Oplossingen: Semmaa Audio werkt nauw samen met klanten om producten te ontwikkelen die volledig voldoen aan hun specifieke wensen en verwachtingen.

Onze Missie: Bij Semmaa Audio streven we ernaar de audio-ervaring naar nieuwe hoogten te brengen door producten te creëren die zowel technisch als artistiek perfect zijn. Door alles met de hand te maken, kunnen we de hoogste kwaliteit en de meest verfijnde details leveren, zodat iedere luisteraar muziek ervaart zoals deze bedoeld is: puur, helder en met absolute precisie.

These advancements free the team to focus on what matters most: building relationships, driving sales, and delivering unmatched customer support.

"AMI has always been about relationships and results," said Christos Desalernos, Owner and President. "With AMI 2.0, we are combining decades of industry experience with modern tools and a fresh approach to help our vendors and partners grow."

The launch will be accompanied by a new website, an industry-wide media campaign, and expanded initiatives including new sales coverage in key territories and strategic line card growth.

With AMI 2.0, Aldridge Marketing is building on its long legacy while embracing the future of the AV industry and technology as a whole.

Premier Acoustic have pioneered 'eVax'.
This is the generic term used to describe the combination of features applied to Voice Evacuation Speakers to ensure compliance with BS5839 part 8 and beyond.

• Simple fix mild steel flame dome
• 3-way ceramic terminal block
• Thermal fuse to isolate transformer from the circuit
• First fix termination of cables to ceramic block

Name: Vicky Strategies
Description:
Professional Profile and Branding
Your LinkedIn profile is your digital identity, so it's crucial to craft a clear, professional narrative that highlights your skills, expertise, and unique experiences. Start with a high-quality profile picture and a compelling headline that reflects your role and aspirations. Your summary should succinctly explain who you are, what you do, and how you bring value. It’s also helpful to include a personalized banner that aligns with your industry or personal brand.

Showcase Skills and Expertise
Focus on listing your core competencies and strengths. LinkedIn allows you to highlight specific skills, so ensure you include relevant ones to make it easy for others to see your areas of expertise. Collect endorsements from colleagues or clients to add credibility to your abilities. Include recommendations from connections that speak to your impact, work ethic, or collaboration skills, as these are valuable social proof.

Engagement and Networking
Stay active on LinkedIn by regularly sharing insights, commenting on relevant posts, and engaging with thought leaders in your field. By connecting with others, joining relevant groups, and interacting in discussions, you can strengthen relationships, learn new perspectives, and enhance your professional presence. Always aim to create meaningful connections that foster collaboration and mutual growth.

Name: Syndicate of Sounds
Description:
Syndicate of Sounds is thee forefront of advanced audio technology, providing unmatched surround sound experiences through our patented Déjà Vu technology. 

We transform stereo audio into immersive 5.1 surround sound, remaining faithful to the music's original production characteristics and offering consistent, artifact-free audio. 

The technology is based on a proprietary audio algorithm that derives immersive audio from the original stereo mix.

Déjà Vu is an exceptional addition to any audio hardware or software manufacturer's product line due to its high-performance standards and seamless integration capabilities. 

With its flexible implementation options, Déjà Vu can easily be incorporated into existing hardware or software systems.

For audio hardware manufacturers, the incorporation of Déjà Vu into their products translates into a top-notch, seamless surround sound experience that enhances their offerings, whether for home audio systems, car stereos, or portable devices. 

Software manufacturers can create powerful audio processing applications or plugins that transform the listening experience across various platforms.

Déjà Vu is a technology that can be implemented in a wide range of audio products, from home theater systems to automotive audio, and even professional audio software. 

Live venue sound systems can offer a captivating immersive listening experience  that is second to none. It's audio that doesn't sound 'squished' or 'distorted'. 
Instead, end-users will savor their immersive surround sound experience. 

It truly is like no other.

Déjà Vu preserves natural sonic integrity, frequency response, audio level, and faithfully supports all the original production characteristics. 

Numerous world-renowned music producers, engineers, artists and music lovers around the world have heard Déjà Vu, and all have given her a hearty   
Gary Katz (Steely Dan) 
Hugh Padgham (The Police, Phil Collins) 
Frank Filipetti (Elton John)

Description:
O NÁS
V současnosti jsme jedinou českou firmou produkující vlastní audio výrobky pod svou vlastní značkou v širokém rozsahu, čímž si upevňujeme přední pozici nejenom na českém trhu. Kromě prodeje z našeho webu, se na obratu firmy podílí rovněž export do mnoha zemí, v nichž jsme zřídili exkluzivní zastoupení.
CO NAJDETE V KATALOGU A NA WEBU
Budete-li listovat našim nabídkovým katalogem, letáky s návrhy ozvučení, mnoha tištěnými, i knižními, publikacemi, či surfovat na našem webu, takt narazíte na profesionální techniku pro muzikanty, moderátory, řečníky, školy, školení, zábavu, na Hifi techniku a domácí kino, instalační ozvučovací techniku, kterou nazýváme plošným ozvučením, ozvučení pro bydlení, interiéry, exteriéry, dále na mikrofonní techniku s drátovými i bezdrátovými mikrofony, kterou využijete pro řečnické i hudební ozvučení. Zajímavou kategorii je ozvučení pro rodině domy a byty, kde jsme průkopníky a nabízíme jak zcela skryté ozvučení, bezdrátové, tak i ozvučení bytu a ozvučení rodinného domu prostřednictvím aplikací v telefonu a moderních bezdrátových technologií. Poslední velkou kategorií je příslušenství, takové jako konektory, kabely, elektrosoučástky a další montážní materiál, který je nezbytný pro realizaci ozvučovacích systémů, a který použijete pro vlastní stavbu hifi i profesionálních reprosoustav pro kapely a muzikanty.
OZVUČÍME COKOLIV
Zajistíme ozvučení pro školy, obecní rozhlas, ozvučení hřiště, ozvučení zdravotní ordinace, ozvučení v hotelu, ozvučení bytu, ozvučení rodinného domu, ozvučení prodejny, ozvučení supermarketu, ozvučení výroby, ozvučení kanceláře, ozvučení skladu, ozvučení kulturního domu, ozvučení domácnosti, ozvučení nástupiště, ozvučení perónu, ozvučení čekárny, ozvučení penzionu, ozvučení wellness, ozvučení kapely, ozvučení diskotéky, ozvučení hudebního klubu, ozvučení kostela, ozvučení kulturních akcí, ozvučení obecního úřadu, ozvučení průmyslu, ozvučení průmyslové technologie, ozvučení sjezdovky, ozvučení koupaliště a další.

Name: Fryderyk Danielczyk Store
Description:
Fryderyk Danielczyk STORE has been set up as a result of my passion for REVITALISING furniture, mainly from the 60s and 70s but not only.

Unlike restoration or conservation, revitalisation means GIVING OBJECTS A NEW LIFE without making the old mistakes. In the past furniture and audio manufacturers either didn't have the necessary knowledge or any choice and that's why they used poor quality upholstery, toxic substances to preserve the furniture or harmful varnishes, paints and adhesives.

I make sure that every product I revitalise keeps its BEAUTIFUL FORM, is LONG-LASTING and ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY at the same time. That?s why in my work I use HIGH QUALITY NATURAL MATERIALS (fabrics, veneers etc.) and oils which, unlike varnishes and paints, let the wood BREATHE.

Revitalisation is a form of true RECYCLING which helps reduce the pollution of the environment and save at least a little bit of the fading history. Each product at Fryderyk Danielczyk STORE is a HIGH QUALITY, ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY and EXTRAORDINARY item with a SOUL which I can PERSONALISE and tailor to suit even the most demanding customers needs.

Let me invite you to browse through and co-design the extraordinary vintage audio and furniture.

Fryderyk Danielczyk

Name: Analogue Alchemy
Description:
Analogue Alchemy – Where Sound Becomes Art

At Analogue Alchemy, we specialize in bespoke audio equipment design and creation, delivering hand-crafted, high-performance solutions for discerning audiophiles, music lovers, and collectors of exceptional sound.

Our work is rooted in analogue purity—from classic tube amplifiers to precision-crafted phono stages and custom preamps, every piece we build is a unique fusion of engineering excellence, artisanal craftsmanship, and timeless design. 

We offer a range of custom services, including:
	•	Bespoke Equipment Design & Build
Every build begins with a deep conversation. We take your preferences, musical taste, system goals, and aesthetic style into account to design a one-of-a-kind piece that’s as personal as it is functional. From circuit topology to component selection to chassis finish, no detail is too small.
	•	High-End Tube Amplifiers
Using NOS and modern production tubes from legends like Western Electric, Takatsuki, and Elrog, we design SET and push-pull amplifiers that breathe life into every recording. We favor point-to-point wiring, premium passive components, and transformer matching that reveals the soul of the music.
	•	Phono Stage & Preamp Design
For vinyl connoisseurs, we craft high-gain, low-noise phono stages and preamps that extract the finest detail from your records. Whether it’s RIAA accuracy or tube warmth you’re after, we’ll help you rediscover your vinyl library in all its glory.
	•	Small Batch Production & Limited Editions
While most of our work is bespoke, we occasionally release extremely limited editions of amplifiers or components. Each is built in-house with the same level of care, tuning, and attention to musicality.

At Analogue Alchemy, we don’t just build audio gear—we create instruments for listening. Our mission is to connect you to your music on a deeper, more emotional level through gear that celebrates purity, passion, and presence.

Let’s build something extraordinary together.

Name: Doneo Co Ltd
Description:
Being one of the first companies to offer custom installation in Malta, Doneo Co. Ltd had the pick of the bunch when it came to choosing the brands it distributes and sells. Needless to say… we chose the best.

Shouldn’t you?

By choosing Doneo, whether for your home or business needs, you will benefit from our specialist advice and service. As distributors of most of the respected brands you will see within this site, we make sure that our clients benefit from the special relationship we enjoy with our suppliers, both in value, and expert assistance.

Our suppliers also benefit… in the knowledge that their end users are being looked after. As a company offering custom installations, Doneo Co. Ltd is a member of CEDIA (Custom Electronic Design and Installation Association). This means that our clients don’t have to worry about a job being completed to anything but the highest of standards.

Our History…
Since opening for business in 1986, the company has gone through some very big changes. We started out by providing after-sales service and technical support to local HI-FI and electronic equipment distributors before expanding operations into retail and distribution. Further growth has seen Doneo Co. Ltd develop into what is now Malta’s leading company in the field of custom installed audio-visual, lighting and control integration systems for the home and business.

By offering all this as a distributor, an installer and a retailer, we are unique. No matter how the operations of Doneo have expanded over the years, the emphasis has always been placed on service first… and foremost… whether providing expert consultation, professional installations or highly qualified after-sales assistance.
