Name: YG Acoustics
Description:
Founded in 2002, YG Acoustics is recognized as one of the leading manufacturers in the high-end audio industry.

Everyone at YG loves music and our loudspeakers reflect our passion. They provide the most accurate, most musical performance possible today.

Our drive to recreate the emotional magic of a live performance constantly inspires us to push the boundaries of audio technology. Over the years, our journey has led us to many proprietary innovations in design, materials and manufacturing.

YG loudspeakers bring together the very latest in science and technology. They are built from the highest performance materials, manufactured in-house to an unprecedented precision. They deliver exceptional measurements: huge frequency bandwidth, exceptional phase coherence, enormous dynamic range and vanishingly low distortion.

More importantly, they provide the clearest of windows into the performance. They communicate every nuance of emotion, every musical cue from the tiniest micro-detail through to the physical impact of the most thunderous crescendo.

At YG we are lucky enough to hear our speakers every day. They can bring tears to our eyes or leave us with ear-to-ear grins that last the whole day. We hope you like them as much as we do.

Name: SPL electronics GmbH
Description:
About SPL

SPL has been developing and manufacturing analog and digital audio gear for the music, film, multimedia, and broadcasting industries for over 40 years. SPL products are respected worldwide for their innovative approach and user-friendliness, but most of all for their outstanding performance. Among SPL's most celebrated developments are the patented Vitalizer sound-optimization processing, the first-ever level-independent dynamic processor known as the Transient Designer, the 5.1 microphone system Atmos, as well as compact monitor controllers and channel strips. The development of the SUPRA op amps by SPL allowed analog signal processing to outperform the best digital processing in terms of quality. These op amps, which make use of the unsurpassed 120V technology, were first used on the MMC mastering console. Ever since, the 120V technology has become a quality trademark of SPL products and is the basis for all devices of the SPL Mastering series as well as for various devices of the SPL Studio series, such as the 120V technology microphone preamplifier Crescendo. Within the SPL HiFi series “ProfessionalFidelity”, this 120V technology became known under the name VOLTAiR. Its collaboration with German company Brainworx resulted in the Analog Code plug-Ins, which translate to the digital realm the same quality expected from all SPL products.

Sound Performance – Made in Germany

Description:
Honsenn is a high-tech audio enterprise with expertise in design, development & manufacturing of Headphones and earbuds, and various other audio products. Our products have gone in hands of millions of audio lovers and audio experts through various brands we have catered to in our short but rich history of two decades.

With a 30 strong engineering team of Acoustic, Mechanical and Electrical engineers, we have designed, developed and manufactured some of the leading headphone models for many premium audio brands around the world. Our state-of-art manufacturing plant is strategically located in Dongguan City, in the Pearl River Delta (PRD) region which is the heart of tech-manufacturing and Product development for the whole world. Our 400 highly skilled workers craft products for music lovers around the world, with precision & love!

We provide Design & Development services from the concept stage (ODM) with the highest confidentiality and we do the manufacturing for the same. In addition, our inhouse design team develops our own models regularly to offer to our clients for OEM. All of this is done keeping sustainability and environmental responsibility in mind.

We have co-operation contracts with most of the leading semi-conductor suppliers and we keep sufficient amount of chipsets in stock to make sure that the production is consistent. We provide headphones and earbuds with multiple solutions such as, Qualcomm, SmartLink, Pixart, Realtek, BES, WuQi, JL, Airoha to name some.

China’s national TV channel CCTV has showcased and interviewed Honsenn as one of the leading enterprises for technology in the nation. We owe our fast growth to our people. Facilities, training and welfare of our employees is always our topmost priority. We exchange love with the people we work with, and we are open for new talents to compliment our continuous growth.

You might not know Honsenn, but there is a high possibility that if you love music, you might have used one of our products!

Name: Ophit
Description:
Ophit USA delivers professional video and AV connectivity solutions, including extenders, converters, and KVM systems for secure, low-latency signal transmission. Trusted across broadcasting, healthcare, government, education, security, surveillance, and casinos, our products ensure reliable, high-performance video and control signal distribution worldwide.

Ophit USA is a leading manufacturer of optical and digital interface components, specializing in professional video and AV connectivity solutions. Using engineering expertise and efficient manufacturing, Ophit produces products for switching, distribution, conversion, and long-distance signal extension.

Our solutions support HDMI, DisplayPort, DVI, USB, and KVM workflows, enabling secure, low-latency transmission of high-resolution video, audio, and control signals over fiber and copper infrastructure. Ophit products are widely used across industries including broadcasting, healthcare, government, education, security, surveillance, and casinos, ensuring signal integrity, scalability, and reliability for demanding applications.

Committed to delivering practical, field-proven connectivity solutions, Ophit USA partners with integrators, consultants, and OEMs worldwide to solve complex video and signal transmission challenges.

Description:
HDS Studios est spécialisé dans la conception, la fabrication et l’installation de cabines acoustiques et studios insonorisés.

Depuis plus de 15 ans, nous développons des solutions reposant sur une structure double dite « boîte dans la boîte », avec volumes désolidarisés, sols, parois et portes indépendants.
Ce principe constitue la base de l’ensemble de nos réalisations, des modèles standards aux projets sur mesure.

Nos solutions s’adressent aux musiciens, studios, institutions et entreprises ayant des exigences réelles en matière d’isolation acoustique et de confort d’usage.
Chaque projet est adapté aux contraintes du lieu, de l’activité et des objectifs acoustiques.

Nous privilégions :
- une approche technique claire
- des tests réels
 -des solutions éprouvées dans le temps
- des échanges directs

HDS Studios intervient principalement en France et en Europe.

EN

HDS Studios specializes in the design, manufacturing and installation of acoustic booths and soundproof studios.

For more than 15 years, our work has been based on a double structure known as a box in box system, with fully decoupled volumes, independent floors, walls and doors.
This principle remains the foundation of all our current solutions.

Our projects are designed for musicians, studios, institutions and companies requiring effective sound isolation and reliable working conditions.
Each project is adapted to the specific constraints of the site and the intended use.

We focus on :
- a clear technical approach
- real-world testing
- long-term proven solutions
- direct and precise communication

HDS Studios operates mainly in France and Europe.

mediacraft beliefert den installierenden Fachhandel seit 1992 mit hochwertigen Lautsprechern und modernen Verstärkern.

Ein großer Vorteil der Multi-Room-Audio Systeme, sie lassen sich unauffällig in jede Wohnung integrieren.

Clever untergebrachte, oft sogar unsichtbare, Lautsprecher füllen Ihre Räume mit herausragendem Klang und Kinospaß, statt mit raumgreifendem Equipment. Die von mediacraft an den Fachhandel vertriebenen Lautsprecher integrieren sich hervorragend in die unterschiedlichste Architektur im Haus und im Garten.

Die Verstärker dazu übernehmen Musik von unterschiedlichsten Tonquellen und den marktüblichen Steuerungssystemen im Smart-Home und erreichen zusammen eine neue Qualität in der Wiedergabe.

In 1986, armed with a desk, a telephone, and a desire to provide affordable electronic parts and accessories to audio/video enthusiasts, Parts Express was born on the second floor of an old dusty automotive plant in Dayton, Ohio. Over the next decade, driven by a passionate team with an intimate knowledge of the audio/video industry, we quickly outgrew our humble operation and relocated to our current headquarters in Spingboro, Ohio in the spring of 1997.

Name: diapason-italia
Description: Diapason, founded in 1987, is an Italian authentic artisan company that builds reference loudspeaker systems with passion and experience. Diapason was born from the professional need of live music recording engineer who needed a reliable mixing and mastering monitor. This birth forged Diapason approach which is about aiming to a precise objective while conceiving each of its creations: providing the listener with the whole palette of emotions of a live musical performance, rendering the full spectrum of perceptions and sensations involved. To achieve this goal, each loudspeaker system is designed paying attention down to the smallest detail, aiming for the optimal propagation of sound and leaving the music free to expand. This involves use of solid wood for the cabinet construction and a thorough study of shapes allowing the loudspeaker system to “disappear” as soon as the music spreads and fills the environment. Solid wood is a wonderful living material, its nature provides a unique contribution to the tonal balance: using it involves ancient Italian knowledge which links this choice with the world of luthiers and which is expression of the finest artisanal skills, all of this belongs to the Diapason heritage. Despite using the most advanced electro-acoustic tools and simulation software the Diapason added value is spending a lot of time in the final tuning process of each creation, strictly executed by ear: musical experience and listening skills acquired over the years makes the real difference in the Diapason unique voicing which has been worldwide recognized with countless awards. Diapason is about creations designed and handcrafted by humans to convey human emotions, not about products designed by machines for “machines”

Name: Audio-Technica Deutschland GmbH

Überblick
Audio-Technica wurde 1962 in Japan gegründet und hat es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, mit seinen Mikrofonen, Kopfhörern, Drahtlossystemen, Mischern und Plattenspielern bedeutungsvolle Verbindungen durch Klang zu schaffen. Von der Bereitstellung von Mikrofonen für die größten Sportereignisse der Welt bis hin zur Lieferung von Mischpulten für Regierungsgebäude auf der ganzen Welt - Audio-Technica ist stets bestrebt, die höchste Klangqualität für alle zu erreichen.
 
Als Teil dieses Strebens hat Audio-Technica mit einigen der weltweit führenden Audiounternehmen zusammengearbeitet, um Audio-Technica Distribution zu gründen, die Anlaufstelle für lösungsorientiertes Audioequipment. 
 
In Europa ist Audio-Technica mit Niederlassungen in Frankreich, Deutschland, Großbritannien, Spanien, den Niederlanden und Ungarn vertreten. Diese Niederlassungen unterstützen die Vertriebs-, Logistik- und Marketinganforderungen der EMEA-Region, und ein umfangreiches Netzwerk von Vertriebspartnern wird von den Logistikzentren in den Niederlanden, Großbritannien und Spanien beliefert. Alle diese Niederlassungen tragen dazu bei, dass die EMEA-Region mit einer Vielzahl von Audiomarken aus einer Hand versorgt wird.

Name: Jensen Speakers
Description:
Throughout the 1940s, 1950s and most of the 1960s, Fender, Ampeg, Gibson, Supro, Magnatone and many other major USA amplifier companies used Jensen musical instrument speakers, until Jensen ceased their production in the late 1960s.
In 1996 SICA Altoparlanti (Italy) welcomed the challenge to reintroduce the legendary Jensen loudspeakers into the market, starting a painstakingly accurate process, that led to the reintroduction of iconic speaker models such as the P10R and the P12N in the Vintage Alnico serie , followed by the Vintage Ceramic series, with the C10Q and the C12N, among many others.
In 2008 a series dedicated to the most contemporary music genres was introduced, the Jet series, including loudspeakers with AlNiCo, and ceramic magnets. The Tornado series followed, with our unique neodymium magnet, assembled with an “inside voice coil” configuration, just like the vintage AlNiCo loudspeakers, resembling that specific sound and feel closely.
Today Jensen Speakers are one of the industry's primary choices, for both the most vintage-inspired tones, as well as for the most modern, dynamic and versatile amplifier designs.
Jensen Speakers are adopted by a variety of world-class amplifier manufacturers and are distributed worldwide through a network of trade partners.
Our manufacturing facility in Senigallia, in the Marche region of Italy, is an example of creativity and high-tech engineering. The no-compromise attitude of our team is reflected not only in the sound quality of our speakers but also in the top-grade reliability and consistency they have proven these past decades.

One of the things that sets Harmonic Hive apart from other audio software companies is their dedication to exploring new and innovative approaches to music-making. They are constantly pushing the boundaries of what is possible with digital audio, developing new tools and techniques that allow musicians and producers to create music that is both unique and compelling.
Another key aspect of Harmonic Hive's approach is their focus on collaboration. They work closely with musicians, producers, and sound engineers to ensure that their software meets the needs of the industry, and they are always looking for new ways to help their users work together more effectively.
Overall, Harmonic Hive is a company that is dedicated to helping musicians and audio professionals create the best possible music and sound. With their innovative software, commitment to quality, and focus on collaboration, they are sure to continue making a major impact on the world of digital audio for years to come.

Name: Lockwood Loudspeakers
Description:
Lockwood Loudspeakers is a British high-fidelity loudspeaker manufacturer founded in the 1930s.

Inspired by the first UK television broadcast in 1936, carpenter Stanley Timms began building radio cabinets and soon shifted his focus to building high-quality loudspeakers. A partnership with the BBC led to the creation of the legendary Lockwood monitors, preferred by major TV, radio, and recording studios worldwide.

With a reputation for exceptional sound quality, Lockwood Loudspeakers have been trusted by thousands of music legends, including The Beatles, Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Bob Dylan, Emmylou Harris, Pearl Jam, Peter Gabriel, R.E.M., Robbie Robertson, Sheryl Crow, Iggy Pop, Daniel Lanois, Lenny Kravitz, Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, U2, and many more. These legendary speakers have played a vital role in the creation of some of the world’s most iconic and best-sounding albums.

Trusted by music producers, music makers and music lovers, perfect for listening at home or in the studio.

A Sound to Remember...

Name: Steady Group
Description:
Hvem er Steady?

Hos Steady skaber vi rammerne for oplevelser, der huskes. Vi er specialister i lyd, lys og AV-løsninger og hjælper virksomheder, arrangører og organisationer med at realisere events, der gør indtryk – fra konferencer og firmaarrangementer til koncerter og festivaler.

Vi arbejder ud fra princippet “Event One Stop Shop”. Det betyder, at vi kan samle alle tekniske løsninger ét sted – fra lydanlæg og mikrofoner til lysdesign, LED-skærme og totalløsninger med scene, teknik og bemanding. Når du samarbejder med os, får du én partner, der tager ansvar for helheden, så du kan fokusere på indhold og gæster.
Vores team af erfarne teknikere og projektledere brænder for at omsætte idéer til virkelighed. Vi går op i detaljen – fra planlægning og opsætning til nedtagning – og skræddersyr løsninger, der matcher dit behov.

Hvad kan vi hjælpe med?
Konferencer og møder: AV-udstyr, mikrofoner, præsentationer og streaming.
Koncerter og festivaler: Kraftfuld lyd, kreativt lysdesign og scener, der løfter stemningen.
Firmaevents: Professionelle løsninger, der giver gæsterne en helstøbt oplevelse.
Totalløsninger: Fra idé til færdigt setup – alt samlet ét sted.

Hos Steady tror vi på, at teknikken skal understøtte budskabet og forstærke oplevelsen. Derfor tilpasser vi altid vores løsninger til budget, format og lokation. Vi er fleksible, løsningsorienterede og klar til at rykke hurtigt, også når tidsfristen er stram.
Vi ved, at events handler om mere end udstyr. Det handler om stemning, fællesskab og at skabe øjeblikke, som publikum tager med sig. Med Steady som partner får du ikke bare teknik – du får et engageret team, der går hele vejen for at gøre dit event til en succes.

Name: Vox Boy
Description:
Together, John and Taylor recognized the challenges actors face, particularly the money lost when travel prevents them from auditioning or performing unless they rent out costly studios on the road. Even worse, many are forced to cobble together makeshift setups on the fly—stuffing gear into bags, draping blankets over furniture, or squeezing into hotel closets surrounded by pillows—just to capture a passable recording.

They also saw how amateur voice actors often don’t know where to start—struggling to figure out which microphone, audio interface, filters, headphones, or software they need just to begin recording. The process can be overwhelming, expensive, and filled with trial-and-error.

That knowledge led to the creation of VoxBoy, the first-ever mobile voiceover studio. Built to resolve these pain points, VoxBoy eliminates the guesswork of where to start or what gear to buy—delivering a ready-to-use package with everything needed to record instantly.
For working talent, its rugged, carry-on sized design ensures you’ll never miss an audition or job while traveling, offering a protected, plug-and-play solution built for life on the go.

Name: AQ, s.r.o.
Description:
We are a traditional Czech company with more than 25 years of history in the production of loudspeakers. In addition to the production of loudspeakers, we also carry out large-scale audiovisual projects and our modern production capacities in the field of woodworking enable us to carry out demanding custom cooperation.

Production of loudspeakers
We currently offer our customers around thirty models of AQ loudspeakers in the Tango, Wega, Labrador, Pontos, Canto and Passion ranges, available in up to seven colour options. We are proud that our loudspeakers are manufactured in the Czech Republic. We use carefully selected materials and components to achieve a favourable quality/price ratio. 
We have two technologies of cabinet production. For the basic series we use a line with continuous foil application on MDF boards, higher series are made with real natural veneer.
For the production of the Pontos and the premium Passion series we use the capacities of our new paint shop, with the possibility of finishing in piano gloss in the shade of the customer's choice.
The fact that we control the entire production allows us to offer a 5-year warranty on our loudspeakers.
We offer AQ loudspeakers in our own network of AQ audio studio stores in Prague, Brno and Červenka and at authorized dealers.

Design and implementation of A/V projects
In the field of professional sound systems we offer design and implementation of customized projects, especially in the following areas:
educational buildings
conference rooms
AV installations in historical buildings
museum exhibitions

Cooperative and OEM production
Modern production and warehouse capacities allow us to be a reliable partner in the field of cooperative production - we cooperate as a supplier of major world brands.

Retail and wholesale of consumer electronics
We are the exclusive distributor of the Pro-Ject, AudioQuest, Arcam, JBL, Mark Levinson, GoldenEar and Lindemann brands.

Name: JSC Autogarsas
Description:
AUTOGARSAS - namų bei automobilių garso (audio), vaizdo (video) aparatūros prekyba ir montavimas. Automobilių elektrinės dalies remontas, apsaugos sistemos, komforto įranga. Protingų namų įrengimas.

Mes galime padėti jums išsirinkti kas geriausia jūsų namams, automobiliui bei laisvalaikiui. Daugiau nei 27 metus patirties turintis profesionalus kolektyvas patars, pakonsultuos ir padės išsirinkti optimaliausią sprendimą.

Kodėl mes?

-Mes manome, kad technologijų amžiuje nepasimėgauti jų teikiamomis galimybėmis būtų mažų mažiausia neapdairu. Dėl to rekomenduojame įsigyti tokią garso įrangą, kuri visu šimtu procentų atitiktų jūsų, o ne draugo poreikius.
-Kaip tai padaryti? Pradėkime nuo asmeninės konsultacijos. Jos metu išsiaiškinsime individualius poreikius. Atsižvelgdami į jūsų lūkesčius ir skiriamą biudžetą, pateiksime personalizuotus pasiūlymus. Taip pat visuomet pasirūpiname, kad jums apsipirkti mūsų parduotuvėje būtų verta ir naudinga. Būtent dėl to turime nemažą lojalių klientų ratą.
-Kai kuriems klientams išsirinkti kolonėles ar stiprintuvą tampa gana sudėtinga. Tokiu atveju kviečiame užsukti į mūsų parduotuvę Kaune. Sujungsime jūsų norimą garso sistemą ir kartu įsitikinsime skambėjimo kokybe.
-Taip pat siūlome konsultacijas po pirkimo. Drąsiai skambinkite mūsų specialistams. Jie asmeniškai jums suteiks visą norimą informaciją.

Name: Lenard Audio Pty Ltd
Description:
Lenard Audio is an Australian audio design company specialising in electro-acoustic engineering.   Since the late 1970’s Lenard Audio has been established as a brand name representing the designs of John Lenard Burnett and was incorporated by John’s daughter, Phaenelagh (Nel) Burnett as Lenard Audio Pty Ltd in 2014.  “Lenard” is the middle name of John Lenard Burnett who founded Lenard Sound, in 1966.  

“Cleaning the Airwaves” by “Removing Ear Pollution”.
All Lenard Audio systems are integrated and 4-way active, attaining to achieve transparency.  4-Way active is the function of a loudspeaker system where the signal is divided into 4 separate and dedicated registers by an electronic crossover prior to being sent to the amplifiers.  This can then be represented by 2 or more loudspeaker drivers.

4-way active design is a result of attaining to achieve the optimum outcome of five (5) primary attributes, which also provide a proposed standardisation for the audio industry; the Lenard Audio Application Standards.  These proposed standards run in order of precedence and provide the audio industry the means for which the experience of sound and music can achieve consistency across all music reproduction platforms and in all environments. 
1.	Intelligibility and voice articulation – ensuring clarity and separation between the instruments and voices
2.	Spectral energy balance – sound balance consistent at all power levels
3.	Harmonic detail – raising the sound ceiling
4.	Bass discernment – bass notes reproduced evenly
5.	Directivity control – broadening the stereo “sweet spot”

These attributes are a representation of the critical requirements of any sound system design to enable full fidelity of sound and transparency. It is Lenard Audio's intention to work with creators and industry to verify and obtain consensus on these attributes in order to establish a universal standardisation framework for audio hardware design and sound/music recording.

Name: CamDo
Description:
This is a small, informal start up gathering minds together with the shared interest of worker ownership of the means of production making audio productions to order or completely from scratch for musicians by passionate creators. Its not much but every company needs to start somewhere. I'm just one person. I have a dream. I have a opportunity to make it a reality. I want to see people enthused by my creations and create a space where the limitations of my products such as The Laser Synthesizer are pushed to their limits and used in ways I would've never imaged otherwise. This is purely non-profit. All proceeds made from products and studio rentals will be cycled back into research, maintaining the company, and paying workers as I don't want money acting as a conflict of interest in the products and solutions produced. 
This is a completely out of left field business model with lots of find details to work out, but if it comes to either charging companies for their e-waste to recycle into my products or resell rare components instead of it going into a landfill. I don't want to lose this opportunity I have. I don't have anything that can cure cancer, bring world peace, or make a difference, but seeing how musicians react to the Laser Synthesizer gives me all the hope I need to let my passion guide me forward. 
If you are a larger company seeing this, I would love to receive any help I can via e-waste collection, investments, or supplementing the means of production. I will have to negotiate terms to ensure we don't have conflicts of interest and expectations of a partnership are met. All I want is for my products to remain open source for all, receive protection to keep CamDo products open source, and give me full freedom of product development as I'm a team of one. Consultants are all I need to guide my passion but my aim is unfailing.
If you're interested, don't hesitate to reach out to me because I have all the answers you need to kick start this immediately.

Name: Fabli
Description:
Between ages 0-5, an astounding 90% of brain development takes place. Yet, children in North America spend over three hours daily in front of screens, contributing to underperformance in school, attention disorders, hyperactivity, and deficits in emotional and social skills—one of the most pressing generational challenges.

Currently, parents are limited to screen-based entertainment and educational apps for young children. What’s missing is an engaging, screen-free alternative that actively supports healthy brain development during these formative years.

Our solution: the Fabli Player, an interactive audio device combining physical, auditory, and light-based interactions to create a rich, screen-free experience. With Fabli, children become the heroes of immersive adventures, making choices, solving puzzles, and experiencing stories that engage their cognitive, emotional, and social skills. Developed in collaboration with psychologists and educators, Fabli’s content enhances emotional intelligence, creativity, mindfulness, and cognitive growth.

The Fabli Player also integrates movement-based activities—jumping, tilting, rotating—encouraging active play alongside cognitive engagement. And for calming routines, it features soothing soundscapes and lullabies designed to promote relaxation and bedtime mindfulness. With Fabli, children experience a full sensory, screen-free adventure that’s both educational and enjoyable.

Unsere Dienstleistungen sind umfassend, unser Know-how fundiert, unser Verständnis für das Handwerk grundlegend und unsere Begeisterungsfähigkeit schier unendlich!

In uns brennt das «Feuer», das uns immer wieder nach der besten technischen Lösung suchen lässt.

Licht, Bild oder Ton sind wichtig. Das Erlebnis im Zusammenspiel jedoch, wird erst dann einzigartig, wenn Technik mit Sinn angewendet wird. Was dann entsteht ist die sprichwörtliche Technik für die Sinne.

Unsere Erfahrung zeigt, dass die Kunst oft in der sinnvollen Anwendung der zur Verfügung stehenden technischen Komponenten liegt. Und diese ist oft in der Einfachheit zu finden ist.

Wir vernetzen Technik mit Sinn; für Ihren Wohnbereich, Ihren Arbeitsplatz, für Bühnen- und Eventtechnik. Wir bieten Telematik für die professionelle Anwendung.

Unsere Lösungen sind nicht immer offensichtlich, immer aber einzigartig und vernetzt.

Im Grunde genommen ganz einfach.

Core Offerings for MSPs and IT Partners:

Proposal Support & Documentation: Accurate estimations, BOMs, and tender assistance.

System Auditing & Design: Pre-installation audits, rack rebuilds, cabling assessments, and comprehensive engineering documentation.

Deployment & Site Management: Large-scale VC/UC rollouts with full project coordination, subcontractor liaison, and compliance oversight.

Logistics & Infrastructure: End-to-end logistics, warehousing, configuration, and certified cabling (structured, coaxial, fibre).

Installation & Programming: Expert AV installations, certified control system programming (Crestron, Extron), DSP tuning (Biamp, Q-SYS).

Commissioning & Handover: Thorough testing, user training, handover packs, and performance validation.

Support & SLAs: Ongoing maintenance, technical support, and Hypercare services via tailored Service Level Agreements.

Our high-standard, process-driven delivery model ensures that MSPs and IT providers can confidently offer AV services under their own brand, without the need for internal AV expertise. We act as an extension of your team—delivering precision, professionalism, and partnership at every stage.

Name: ALLDSP GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
At ALLDSP, we have been developing and manufacturing DSP products for professional audio applications for over 23 years.

All our products are developed and manufactured in Germany. By producing our DSP modules on our in-house Siplace production line, we have full control over our production quality, resulting in extremely high reliability at competitive cost levels that satisfy even the most demanding companies worldwide.

We have a comprehensive range of products that cover a wide range of DSP applications from entry-level to top quality loudspeaker processors, processor boards to match active loudspeaker amplifier modules, processor boards, system amplifiers, outboard equipment, and audio streaming products.

Our expertise includes state-of-the-art technology such as 140dB A/D converters, 64-bit high speed processing, audio networking technology, IIR and FIR filtering blocks, multiband compression and accurate processing with coefficients calculated on the fly. All our products include control software with a customized look-and-feel to control the hardware via Ethernet or USB.

In this era of digital transformation, we have been heavily investing in the automation technology, which means our entire production can be managed by only a few people. This has increased our overall productivity at ALLDSP and ensured more efficient use of materials.

At Airsound Ltd., we are pioneers in the field of audio innovation, dedicated to simplifying and enhancing the listening experience. Founded on the principles of acoustical excellence, our patented technology delivers full stereo sound from a single speaker and an immersive spatial audio experience from just two.

Our journey began with the invention of Airsound in 2005, a groundbreaking approach to sound reproduction that redefines the boundaries of audio design. Airsound is not just a technology; it's a philosophy that believes in the power of simplicity and the potential to expand sonic experiences in every listening environment.

From the living room to the on-the-go setting, our technology has been the foundation for a range of soundbars, Bluetooth speakers, and smart devices that set the standard for audio quality. Our mission is to bring unparalleled sound to consumers worldwide, creating products that offer a rich, multidimensional audio experience that is consistent and captivating from any angle.

As we grow, we continue to forge strategic partnerships and collaborations with industry leaders to integrate Airsound technology into a variety of consumer electronics, expanding the realm of possible sonic experiences.

Join us at Airsound as we shape the future of audio.

Founded by industry veterans with decades of experience in professional audio and acoustics, we design custom IEMs that deliver unrivaled sound quality and a perfect fit tailored to you.

Our products are engineered for musicians, audio engineers, and sound professionals who demand excellence in every note. Whether you’re on stage, in the studio, or perfecting your craft, our IEMs provide the clarity, depth, and reliability you need to perform at your best.

With a commitment to cutting-edge research and uncompromising craftsmanship, Dark Matter Audio Labs bridges the gap between technical innovation and artistic expression. Join us in shaping the future of professional audio, one custom fit at a time.

Name: Shivansh Electronics
Description:
Hello, and thank you for visiting.
Shivansh Electronics was founded by Mr. Gopal Das Deb, a renowned live sound engineer from Raja Electric, Kolkata, who served as the Chief Sound Engineer for Doordarshan and worked with legendary artists such as Asha Bhonsle, Shreya Ghoshal, Sonu Nigam, Zubin Garg, Arati Mukherjee, Haimanti Shukla, Hariharan, Anup Jalota, and many more.
With over four decades of experience in professional audio, Mr. Gopal Das Deb pioneered several industry trends in Eastern India — from being the first to introduce Audio-Technica microphones in the eastern part of India, to distributing Sennheiser (2008–2012), AVID audio interfaces, and launching Harman's VT Line-Array systems here. He also played a pivotal role in popularizing Yamaha Digital Consoles and pro audio segment as a distributor as well as by offering hands-on training between 2014 and 2020.
Currently, Shivansh Electronics proudly serves as the Eastern India distributor for cutting-edge professional audio brands including MOTU & PEERLESS AUDIO.
I’m Sarbojit Das Deb, currently pursuing my Economics degree at Jadavpur University, and managing the operations and expansion of Shivansh Electronics full-time.
My role focuses on:
-> Marketing & Product Promotion across digital platforms
-> Sales Strategy & Client Relationships
-> End-to-End Brand Representation & Demonstration
-> Driving Awareness and Growth for our Partner Brands in Eastern India
With a deep-rooted passion for pro audio and a modern approach to branding and outreach, I’m committed to carrying forward the legacy while building an even stronger ecosystem for artists, engineers, educators, and integrators.
This isn’t just business for me, it’s a lifelong pursuit to become a well-rounded audio professional, someone who can bridge the gap between engineering precision and creative vision.
Let’s collaborate, not just for transactions, but for transformation in how sound is delivered, experienced & understood.

Created by industry specialists with decades of hands on experience, DirectlyAV exists to remove unnecessary layers of cost, complexity and friction from the AV supply chain. Name: Boundary Communications
Description:
Founded in 2004, Boundary Communications Limited (‘BCL’) is a niche Enterprise-class supplier of Audio-Visual and Video Conferencing solutions and services to organisations operating in the Financial Services sector.  BCL is privately owned by the CEO who founded the business.

Indigo Forward is the trading style of BCL. It is a well-established and recognised brand with a proven track record in successfully delivering the Audio-Visual aspects of commercial collaboration and communication projects. It is a specialist in Audio-Visual system design offering procurement, build and installation services and ongoing support & maintenance contracts.

BCL has an impressive customer base including leading brands in the Financial Services sector. It has focused on building long-term enduring direct relationships with its customers and establishing trusted supplier status which has resulted in renewable business revenues year on year.

In June 2022 as part its growth plans, BCL  acquired I-Klarity Video Solutions Limited (‘I-Klarity’) https://i-klarity.co.uk. The new subsidiary has introduced key customers in the financial services sector, strengthening the overall renewables portfolio and increasing the contribution to overhead.  In addition, BCL is launching a subsidiary company, Worldwide Audio Visual Equipment Limited (‘WAVE’) https://ww-ave.com, focused on the super yacht, motorboats, and shipping sector, generating a new business pipeline via B2B sales channels.  There are further opportunities to grow substantially the Audio-Visual solutions business by acquisition which are exclusive to BCL.

Description:
Om Scandinavian Audio Group (SAG): 

Scandinavian Audio Group (SAG) er en førende inden for high-end lydoplevelser, der forpligter sig til at levere ekstraordinære audioprodukter og tjenester til musikentusiaster, lydentusiaster og kritiske lyttere over hele verden.

Vores Passion: 

Vores lidenskab for lyd er dybt forankret i vores DNA. Vi tror på, at musik er mere end bare lyd - det er en følelse, en oplevelse, en måde at forbinde med verden omkring os. Derfor arbejder vi ubetrædeligt på at fremmane den mest raffinerede og autentiske lyd, der er mulig.

Produktlinjer:

 Paragon Harmony (PH Audio): Under vores PH Audio-mærke skaber vi lydsystemer, der er mesterværker af præcision og skønhed. Vores produkter er kendt for at levere lydkvalitet i verdensklasse, med brug af innovative teknologier og æstetisk design.

 Sharkwire: Vores Sharkwire-produktlinje omfatter højtydende kabler og forbindelser, der er designet til at optimere signalkvaliteten og levere en ren og problemfri lydoplevelse.

 Audio Bastion: Audio Bastion er vores serie af audiomøbler og tilbehør, der kombinerer funktionalitet med æstetik, hvilket skaber en komplet lydomgivelse.

Håndværk og Innovation: 

Hos SAG kombinerer vi ærefrygt for traditionelt håndværk med konstant innovation. Vi er dedikerede til at opnå lydoplevelser af højeste kvalitet og tilbyder vores kunder en bred vifte af produkter, der imødekommer forskellige behov.

Partnerskab med SEAS: 

Vores samarbejde med SEAS (Scandinavian Electro Acoustic Systems) bringer verdensklasse højttalerdrivere til vores produkter og sikrer, at vi leverer lydkvalitet i verdensklasse.

Dedikation til Kvalitet: 

Kvalitet er kernen i alt, hvad vi gør. Fra vores elegante designs til vores banebrydende teknologi, stræber vi altid efter at overgå forventningerne og levere oplevelser af højeste kvalitet.

Slut dig til os på vores rejse til at omdanne, hvordan vi opfatter og nyder lyd.

What we believe in.

RelaJet currently owns two major brands: "Otoadd", which offers Bluetooth Hearing Aids and Hearing Amplifiers devices, and "ThunderFortis", a brand specializing in military-grade night vision goggles and thermal imagers. Both brands incorporate our core technologies, including:

1.  AI Voice Enhancement Engine: Specifically designed to amplify human voices in noisy environments, this engine ensures that individuals with hearing impairments experience clear speech in any setting, facilitating effortless communication.
2.  AI Low-Light Enhancement and Glare Suppression: Utilizing AI algorithms for low-light image enhancement and glare suppression, our night vision devices can clearly perceive the surrounding environment even under extreme low-light conditions.
3.  AI Extended Reality: Combining low-light enhancement with thermal imaging technology to deliver mixed reality, this solution enhances users' situational awareness.

Through our tailor-made innovative products, we provide our customers with unprecedented experiences.

We take all the time that is needed to find the best recording equipment for them, together with our recording team.
Founder Hubert Koekenberg is constantly seeking special music productions. Music productions that need to touch and move people emotionally. Nothing is more special than the feeling in your body after a beautiful concert. That is the feeling we want to capture. That is the feeling we want to realize through our unique core beliefs.

Part of this jouney is the Barcanova Sonore 2828 turntable.
The Sonore turntable will no doubt be the constant factor in your hi-fi collection. Its sound quality will win you over every single time you play an LP. This record player is truly devoted to the vinyl lover to reproduce any musical style as faithfully as the artist intended it to be.

At Sound Wood, we specialize in creating custom audio systems that combine sustainability, high-end audio performance, and artisanal craftsmanship. Our mission is to deliver unique, handcrafted speakers and audio devices that not only sound exceptional but also reduce electronic waste (e-waste recycling) and promote environmentally responsible design.

We take non-functional or outdated vintage audio equipment and give it new life through:

	•	Refurbishing, recapping, and redesigning circuit boards
	•	Custom PCB design and integration with modern hi-res digital audio, streaming, and wireless connectivity
	•	Handcrafted woodworking using reclaimed timber and premium hardwoods

Each unit is one-of-a-kind, combining retro audio heritage with the latest in digital audio technology and modern design. From design and milling to electronics and fine finishing, every Sound Wood piece is crafted by a single artisan, ensuring exceptional attention to detail, quality, and performance.

Name: At-Will Audio
Description:
At-Will Audio is a boutique stompbox company based in Tennessee, born from heartbreak, rebellion, and the sacred art of sound.

We hand-build each pedal with soul — from circuit to enclosure — blending irreverent design with emotional precision. Every unit is painted with intention, assembled by hand, and tested by ear. No compromise. Just raw, expressive tone built for the ones who don’t ask for permission.

This project was launched in 2025 in loving memory of Max Gruber — my brother, my anchor, and my eternal creative partner. His spirit lives in every pedal, every brushstroke, every note. When he passed, something in me broke open. And at the exact same time — my band, 𝐒𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐝𝐚𝐲’𝐬 𝐂𝐡𝐢𝐥𝐝, was finally gaining momentum. My voice came back.

Then I got fired.

Wrongfully terminated in the midst of grieving the loss of my little brother, I was forced to defend my integrity, my grief, and my livelihood — alone. But through that legal battle, something strange happened. I woke up. And as I watched their empire crack under the weight of its own cowardice, I realized: the universe wasn’t punishing me. It was freeing me.

So I built 𝐀𝐭-𝐖𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨 as a tribute. As resistance. As resurrection. The very settlement they refused to offer quietly will soon fund the dreams they tried to mock — including this one.

This isn’t just audio gear. It’s sacred circuitry. Artifacts of defiance, devotion, and sonic liberation.

At-Will means on your terms. Just like Max lived. And just like we play.

Name: Dick Bazirgan
Description:
Dick has been in the Professional Audio Video business for over 40 years and owned the most successful Manufacturers’ Rep firm in New England and Upstate New York.  He also had an extensive run in the consumer electronics business, starting in 1975, and continuing until the mid 1990’s.

Dick sold the business to two long time employees in December of 2021 and thought about all the ways he could use his experience to help others in the industry.  One of his key attributes is developing meaningful relationships with the manufacturers he represented, customers he sold to, and end users that were so important to a successful year.  His level of integrity creates trust with everyone he meets. His searches will be strategic, not transactional.

Dick will only work with the best names in the business, brands we all admire in the AV world. He won’t split his time with other markets, but focus solely on AV, with an emphasis on sales, and sales management from EVP, VP, Director of Sales to the Regional Manager level.  He also understands what it takes to manage a successful inside sales and support team.

Dick has a BS in Marketing from Northeastern University, where he had a football scholarship.  He is a veteran of the 101st Army Airborne and is particularly interested in helping fellow veterans advance their careers.

For the hearing-impaired, our system delivers crisp audio and instant text transcripts, enhancing accessibility to lectures and meetings. The high-quality recordings make it easier to understand speech, and the text option offers an alternative method for absorbing information. Journalists, often working in challenging acoustic conditions, can count on Noise Ninja to focus on and capture the subject's voice clearly, ensuring that important details aren't lost in ambient noise. This makes the task of reporting more precise and reliable.

Name: GUANGZHOU ZHIHONG ELECTRONICS TECHNOLOGY CO., LTD
Description:
CHORDIO: Global  Professional Audio Solutions Provider

Since 2003, CHORDIO has evolved from a core R&D team to a global professional audio leader. It exclusively serves B2B clients (distributors, integrators, venue operators) and turns acoustic innovation into value over 20+ years, delivering reliable, high-performance solutions.

1. Solid Tech & Quality
R&D Leadership: Led by 3 acoustic doctors (20+ years’ experience), it has solved 20+ core challenges, mastering high-sound-pressure linear amplification and precision coverage.

Trusted Credentials: Backed by 100+ patents and 70+ certifications (including SGS).

Strict QC: Every product undergoes rigorous testing—98% signal accuracy, ≤0.01% distortion—ensuring stable client project performance.

2. One-Stop Commercial Solutions
Flagship Systems: Line Array (129dB+ SPL), KTV/Bar Sound (≤60Hz low frequency), Conference Systems (95% coverage in 500㎡).

Professional Gear: Power Amplifiers (85% efficiency), Wireless Mics (50m pickup), Studio Monitors (Hi-Res restoration).

Custom Support: Engineers offer tailored system solutions for stadiums, churches, auditoriums, aligning with their specific spatial and functional requirements.

3. Global & End-to-End Support
Global Reach:  Products ship to 150+ countries/regions (Europe, America, Africa, Southeast Asia) with a 98% on-time delivery rate, avoiding project delays.

Stable Supply Chain: Mature production/logistics keep inventory consistent, meeting clients’ needs.

Proven Success: 500+ global projects (e.g., Côte d’Ivoire Auditorium, Brazilian Churches), earning strong partner recognition.

Full-Cycle Support: Supports from product training to installation guidance.

Name: Offermans Beeld & Geluid BV
Description:
Haarscherp beeld en kraakhelder geluid

Hoe kom je van een goed verhaal naar een briljante presentatie? Dat begint bij de kwaliteit
van de spreker. De toehoorder wil overdonderd worden, in beeld en geluid.
En dat betekent de inzet van hoogwaardige, audiovisuele systemen. 
Offermans levert een compleet aanbod van de beste professionele audiovisuele systemen.

Kleine details vormen grootse successen

Of je nu thuis of in de auto naar muziek luistert, je waardeert de kwaliteit van geluid van topniveau. En datzelfde geldt voor je klanten. Bij de inrichting van je bedrijf, restaurant, hotel of een andere horecagelegenheid weet je dat dit de details zijn die het verschil maken. Dit is het niveau dat je klanten van je mogen verwachten. Een eerste indruk maak je maar één keer. En die indruk kan maar beter goed zijn. 

Displays zijn niet meer weg te denken uit onze belevingswereld in bedrijven, winkels en zelfs op straat. Interactief communiceren kan door middel van een touchscreen, maar ook door het geven van de juiste
informatie of door te adverteren. En door het moderne Digital Signage ofwel narrowcasting kun je de informatie nog beter stroomlijnen. Met dit communicatiemiddel toon je op gezette tijden dynamische informatie aan je doelgroep. Een vriendelijke en effectieve manier om met je klanten, bezoekers of eigen personeel te communiceren. 

Draadloze techniek dient de mens

Draadloze techniek is de vernuftigste oplossing die ons een onbeperkt aanbod geeft aan kennis en informatie. Je kent vast wel het moment dat een presentatie van je collega nog om een paar aanpassingen vraagt voordat hij deze kan streamen naar de vergaderzaal. Of de data zich nu in de cloud bevindt, op een USB-stick staat of lokaal is opgeslagen, maakt dan niets meer uit. Met je eigen device (BYOD) kun je deze collega helpen met de benodigde aanpassingen. En dit nieuwe document deel je vervolgens via streaming of wireless mediapeler.

 Vinyl Body
Designed for music lovers, Vinyl Body produces an array of accessories to care for and enhance your collection. From vinyl storage, cleaners, and protective sleeves to other essential tools, Vinyl Body ensures your records remain pristine while amplifying your listening experience.



At Karrex, we are passionate about preserving the magic of music through quality craftsmanship, authentic experiences, and our dedication to connecting the past with the future. Name: OV8E Professional Speakers
Description:
Jij sluit geen compromis. Niet in design, niet in beleving. Waarom zou je dat wel doen met audio?

Je kent het wel: standaard speakers die een doorn in het oog zijn in je zorgvuldig ontworpen interieur. Of massamerken met lange levertijden en onpersoonlijke service die je projectplanning in de war sturen. Dat is de frustratie waar wij een einde aan maken.

OV8E Speakers is jouw partner in audio. Of je nu interieurarchitect, custom installateur of eigenaar van een horeca- of retailzaak bent; wij begrijpen dat geluid en stijl hand in hand gaan.

Wat je van ons kunt verwachten:
Volledige designvrijheid: Geef je project de finish die het verdient. Met speakers in elke RAL-kleur, door onszelf gepoedercoat, versterk je jouw unieke visie of merkidentiteit.

Snelheid die je verder helpt: Wachten past niet in jouw schema. Omdat we alles in Nederland maken, leveren we maatwerk al binnen 1-2 weken. Zo blijft jouw project op koers.

Een échte concertbeleving: Vlak achtergrondgeluid? Niet bij ons. Met onze unieke DOT-technologie geef je jouw klanten een geluidservaring die ze niet alleen horen, maar ook voelen.

Een slim partnerschap: Voor onze dealers en distributeurs gaan we een stap verder. We bieden een gezonde marge, regionale exclusiviteit en een vliegende start met een gratis demo-plaatsing. Geen gedoe, wel resultaat.

Klaar om je te onderscheiden met een authentiek Nederlands merk dat even sterk presteert in geluid als in service en design? Stuur een bericht en we plannen een kennismaking!

Voice Tracker Array Microphones
Unidirectional microphones with an omnidirectional field of view
The magic in the Acoustic Magic Voice Tracker array microphone resides in the algorithms running on its internal DSP that enable it to form a listening beam and automatically and electronically steer that beam towards the active talker. Name: New Sound Technologies
Description:
Few people realise that the stereo system you have in your home is actually very old technology: the equivalent of black and white TV. 

You miss up to 25% of sounds when listening to songs and movies played in a stereo format.
The only significant advancement in audio, before the Y4 was invented, was "Surround Sound". 
Audio companies have tried to create the illusion of surround sound with up to 21 speakers in your room and movies that have to be specially recorded by them. 

The Y4 receives sound files from your music, tv, and movies, even if they were recorded in stereo, and coverts them to Involve Audio's Hollographic Surround Sound with only 4 bookshelf sized speakers.

Our customers say they hear sounds in their favourite music and movies that they’ve never heard before. Tennis balls bouncing around the room in the exact position they're being played while watching Wimbledon, gun shots and superheroes flying and running around you. The sound is truly immersive!

Name: Farad Power Supplies
Description:
Farad Power Supplies is founded in 2019 by Mattijs de Vries. Mattijs has over 25 years of experience in the audio trade. Starting with NOS tubes, NOS components and numerous modifications the concept of designing and producing audio gear became inevitable.

In 2006 Pink Faun High End Audio saw the light with a mission statement that seems simple, but is very difficult to actually achieve: ‘No Sound, Just Music’. Having successfully stirred the business with many innovative products for many years, Mattijs wanted to return to his roots. Not only in terms of education (Master in applied physics, TU Twente), but also to the subject of which Mattijs says “This is what I truly and fully understand: the power supply.”

Somewhere in 2018 Mattijs had a clear concept for a Linear Power Supply. One following the likes of which he could say ‘properly designed, properly build, and performing like no other for a reasonable price’. This concept would turn into the Super3 that quickly made huge success and found many devoted users around the world.

The Super3 is joined by the Super10 and SuperATX power supplies with more to come in the near future. Designed and hand build in The Netherlands since 2019 with a mission statement from 2006 close to the heart.

Name: Verdant Audio
Description:
Verdant Audio Inc. was founded in 2018 by long time audiophile, Scott Bierfeldt, who set out to create a company with the view that anyone, regardless of budget and experience, should be able to buy a stereo that delivers the extraordinary listening experience that they crave. From his own experience when he first started as a hobbyist, he found that often shopping for high-end equipment could be complex and intimidating, so he had to research and test on his own.  After 25 years of experience, he was ready to save others time and share his experience and advice to new and seasoned audiophiles alike.
With that in mind, Verdant Audio is building out a portfolio of products that will produce an unparalleled sound that allows you to enjoy music in the comfort of your own home, either by yourself or surrounded by friends and family.
